content: Create a dramatic manga-style character poster on an aged off-white paper background, designed like a JoJo-inspired Stand profile page with heavy ink lines, screentone texture, painterly shading, and exaggerated comic energy. The layout is vertical, with a dense information panel on the left and the main figures dominating the center and right. At the top left, large serif English title text reads "LEVERAGE INFINITY" under smaller Japanese text "スタンド名:". Below it, a left-column profile card contains 6 visible info lines with Japanese labels and values: "スタンド使い名:" with the value "1-sphere", "性別: 不詳", "見た目:" followed by a short Japanese description, "年齢: 不詳", "身長: 96cm", and "職業: 市場の条省・養分". Beneath that, add a framed ability box titled "スタンド能力" containing several lines of Japanese body text and a bold English catchphrase at the bottom reading exactly: "Choose... TO THE MOOOOON!! Or face the MARGIN CAAAAALL!!". At the lower left, add a framed radar chart section titled "スタンドパラメータ" with 5 labeled stats around the graph: "破壊力 B", "持続力 C", "成長性 A", "スピード C", and "人念力 B"; fill the radar graph with a translucent pink polygon. The main illustration shows 2 stacked figures: a humanoid Stand above and a pig-like user below. The Stand is tall, metallic, and menacing, with a mushroom-cap helmet head in glossy red with white spots, circular gold-and-pink ear-like side discs, a segmented chrome-and-brass body, muscular but sleek mechanical arms, and a pink pig-snout emblem on the chest. Its face area is obscured by a rectangular censor blur. It reaches one articulated hand toward the viewer in an aggressive foreshortened pose. Around the Stand’s upper body, place 3 large stylized sound-effect glyphs reading "ゴゴゴ" in purple and black. On the far right, add a jagged speech or impact shape with 4 stacked lines of bold Japanese text reading "レヴァ", "レヴァ", "レヴァ", "レヴァ!!". Behind both figures, erupting pink-purple aura flames and floating rock fragments create intense supernatural energy. The lower figure is a short, squat, pig-bodied character standing wide-legged, with pink skin, small hoof-like feet, a yellow-green neckerchief, and a huge mushroom cap hat in red with white spots and a thick yellow underside rim; the torso area is obscured by a large rectangular censor blur. The pig points outward with one hand and holds a woven basket in the other hand containing 3 visible items: 1 blue heart-shaped object and 2 small round produce-like objects. Keep the composition theatrical and bizarre, combining grotesque humor, market-speculation parody, and high-impact manga poster aesthetics.
title: Leverage Infinity Stand Poster
description: A JoJo-inspired manga profile poster showing a bizarre mushroom-themed Stand and pig-like user, ideal for parody character sheets and dramatic anime-style meme art.

content: A dramatic fantasy illustration of a single female angelic figure made entirely of fire, floating against a pure black background. The body is semi-transparent and sculpted from glowing orange, amber, and white-hot flame, with brighter highlights at the head, chest, knee, and pointed lower leg. She has 2 large feathered wings formed from flame trails, arcing upward behind her back, and long flowing hair that sweeps forward in a blazing halo around her head. Her pose is dynamic and balletic: torso arched, left arm extended outward, one leg bent, the other stretched downward into a tapering flame point, as if descending or diving through the air. The figure wears the suggestion of a short dress or skirt shape also formed from fire. Surround the body with turbulent smoke-like flame ribbons and motion streaks, especially trailing behind the wings and around the lower half, creating a sense of speed and supernatural energy. High contrast, luminous edges, ethereal anatomy, no ground, no props, no text, centered vertical composition, cinematic fantasy fire spirit aesthetic.
title: Flaming Angel in Black Void
description: This prompt generates a single dramatic fantasy figure of a winged woman formed entirely from glowing fire, ideal for mythic character art or supernatural poster imagery.

content: A dramatic anime-style portrait of a lone swordsman with an androgynous, elegant presence, shown from mid-thigh up in a three-quarter view, staring intensely at the viewer with narrowed golden eyes. The character has {argument name="hair color" default="deep crimson red"} hair, long and layered with loose messy strands, plus one very long thick braid draped over the front of the body and decorated with turquoise beads and tassels. They wear a dark metallic half-mask covering the lower face, multiple ear piercings with red and silver ornaments, and a confident, dangerous expression. One hand rests behind the neck holding a katana across the shoulders; the sword has a black hilt with red accents and a reflective blade. The outfit is a richly detailed fantasy-meets-feudal-Japanese ensemble: muted brown inner kimono, wide navy and magenta waist wraps, a large golden obi tied loosely, dangling bead ornaments, and a black outer robe lined in red with a fluffy pale fur collar. Add a large red sun emblem on the robe sleeve and teal accessories at the waist. The palette is dominated by red, black, gold, cream, and deep blue. The background is a decorative Japanese-inspired painting with a large glowing red-orange sun disk behind the head, red plum blossoms, smoky cloud-like swirls, parchment-textured beige and charcoal tones, and scattered gold leaf splashes. Highly detailed digital illustration, painterly anime rendering, ornate textures, refined linework, moody lighting, luxurious fabric folds, samurai aesthetic, elegant and fierce atmosphere.

content: A moody dark fantasy anime illustration of a wounded young man with {argument name="hair color" default="ash blond"} short tousled hair, sitting slumped on the floor against a cracked white plaster wall. His face is mostly turned away and partially obscured in shadow, giving him a mysterious, exhausted presence. He wears a loose black kimono robe hanging open at the chest, exposing a lean muscular torso, with a deep red sash at the waist. A long strand of dark crimson prayer beads hangs around his neck, with more beads tangled in one hand and spilled across the floor. Beside him rests an ornate black ceremonial staff with circular rings and a spear-like finial, leaning diagonally against his shoulder. The wall behind him is streaked with dramatic dark red blood smears and drips near the upper right, suggesting a recent battle. On the floor in the foreground are scattered prayer beads, broken metallic ornaments, several paper talismans or ofuda slips with black calligraphy, and a single red flower. Warm late-afternoon light cuts across the scene from the left, creating strong highlights and deep shadows over the robe folds, hand, chest, and wall texture. Painterly brushwork, highly detailed fabric and skin rendering, melancholic atmosphere, elegant gothic composition, vertical portrait framing, cinematic anime key visual style.

content: A highly detailed fantasy anime illustration of two young men reclining inside separate transparent crystal-like display boxes suspended side by side in a dark, theatrical space, split into contrasting themes. The left box has a warm olive-green and gold palette and contains a calm, elegant young man with short light blond hair, pale skin, a black dress shirt, a loosened gold striped tie, cream trousers, and black shoes, lying in a relaxed pose while holding a small flower near his face. Around him are exactly 10 visible decorative elements: 1 brown paper bag filled with leafy green plants, 1 metal mug, 1 lemon, 1 small zebra figurine, 1 open book, 1 sunflower, trailing green vines, many floating soap bubbles, etched white floral drawings on the glass, and greenery covering the floor of the box. The right box has a dramatic crimson red and black palette and contains a mischievous, confident young man with tousled medium brown hair, pale skin, a black outfit with red accents and layered accessories, lounging with one knee raised while biting or holding a red rose. Around him are exactly 10 visible decorative elements: 1 bone-like white skeletal ornament, 1 faceted red gemstone, 1 faceted pale gemstone, 1 hanging card or tag on a chain, 1 red book, 1 wrapped piece of meat or food on a tray, 1 small lion figurine, 1 red snack bag, claw-like scratch marks beneath the box, and sparkling red crystal shards. The background is split vertically into a starry cosmic seam between the two boxes, with draped curtains, strings of triangular bunting, faint paw-print motifs on the red side, and exactly 4 balloons total: 2 on the left in white and olive green, 2 on the right in red and black. Make the composition ornate, glossy, and cinematic, with dramatic reflections on the glass, rich highlights, floating particles, luxurious textures, intricate props, and a nostalgic storybook mood. Render in polished modern anime key art style, ultra-detailed, elegant, dreamlike, and emotionally evocative.

content: A dramatic, painterly anime-style illustration of two androgynous young men standing back-to-back in a dark, romantic historical-fantasy composition. The left figure is taller and shown from mid-thigh up, with very long, messy black hair cascading over the shoulders and chest, a partially open white shirt, a fitted black vest, a brown leather belt, and an ornate black military-inspired coat draped over one shoulder with gold embroidery, gold buttons, a large gold epaulet, fur trim at the collar, and a round red-and-cream rosette detail near the shoulder. His pose is relaxed and theatrical, with one hand lifted into his hair and his head tipped slightly back. The right figure is slightly shorter, shown from the waist up and turned away in profile, with short tousled black hair, a white high-collared shirt, a black vest, dark gloves, and crossed arms, giving a cool, reserved presence. Both characters have pale skin and a moody bishounen aesthetic. The background features a huge glowing red sun or moon centered behind them, with a textured gold-leaf and black grunge backdrop, deep crimson drapery or haze near the lower left, scattered glowing red petals or embers drifting through the air, and red flowering branches on the right side. content:
Create a TV anime key visual using the attached characters.
4:5 size.
Faithfully reproduce the character's hairstyles and the logo.

1. A woman with an ogre mask (legendary blacksmith) in the background with a mysterious large close-up of her face.
2. A man with a troubled expression holding the sword from the 7th image (slightly smaller as a sub-character).
3. A girl in green clothes holding the plushie from the 6th image, looking up at the sky with a startled face from a front position (protagonist).
4. A woman in a kimono looking on from a distance with a worried expression (supporting character).
5. A girl with a ponytail also looking on with a worried expression (supporting character).

Use the logo effectively.

content: A richly detailed anime-style illustration of a late-night Call of Cthulhu tabletop RPG session in a dim antique study lit by warm oil lamps and candles. Three young women sit around a wooden table crowded with game materials. On the left, a girl in a military-style cap and camouflage jacket with long dark braided hair writes notes on a character sheet with a pen, looking stressed and slightly overwhelmed. In the center, a girl with very long pale lavender hair in twin buns and flowing lengths wears an elegant dark green dress with gold trim and white lace cuffs, smiling mischievously while holding up a large hardcover book titled "Talk of Cthulhu" with a dramatic occult monster cover; above her is handwritten Japanese text reading "これで全員 一時的狂気ね" with a small heart. On the right, an orange-haired girl in a white lab coat with a stethoscope and ID badge reads a paper nervously, with handwritten Japanese text above her that says "SAN値が ピンチ！" with energetic accent lines. The tabletop is packed with exactly 10 polyhedral dice scattered across the center, assorted papers, 3 visible character sheets or note pages, 4 large map sheets, 2 mugs with dark emblems, 1 glass of iced cola, 1 plate of cookies, 1 bag of potato chips labeled in Japanese, 1 small standing sign reading "発狂中", 1 black ink bottle, 1 white feather quill, 2 closed occult hardcovers stacked at the lower right, and 1 large open illustrated monster book on the right. The room behind them has tall bookshelves full of old books, framed occult artwork including a tentacled creature image, a large aged wall map with pinned markings and strings, candles, wood furniture, and a moody Victorian occult-library atmosphere. Composition is a wide cinematic group shot from slightly above table height, highly rendered, warm brown and amber lighting, intricate textures, expressive anime faces and hair, playful horror-comedy tone, premium light novel or visual novel key art quality.

content: A photorealistic overhead view of an open Japanese manga magazine held in two human hands at the lower left and lower right corners, shown as a dramatic two-page black-and-white comic spread on slightly warm paper with visible page curvature, center gutter distortion, ink texture, screentone shading, and dense speed lines. The magazine fills almost the entire frame on a neutral tabletop. The spread depicts a fictional over-the-top battle sports manga about {argument name="sport name" default="スカートバウト"}, with exaggerated action, intense expressions, and absurdly serious tournament storytelling. In the center across both pages, show 2 main full-body schoolgirl fighters in a chaotic combat scene: on the left page center a long-haired teenage girl in a dark school blazer, ribbon tie, pleated skirt, and loafers spins powerfully with both arms raised overhead, her hair and skirt flaring in a circular arc; on the right page center a second teenage girl in a sailor-style school uniform is upside down in a handstand-like impact pose, one leg thrust high into the air, skirt exploding outward with violent motion lines, as if she has been thrown or is counterattacking. Make the composition packed with explosive radial lines, debris-like ink flecks, dramatic foreshortening, and giant bold Japanese sound-effect typography crossing the gutter. The spread should read like a mainstream shonen battle manga but focused on skirts and rotational motion rather than weapons. Include exactly 8 side panels around the central action: 4 stacked along the far left page and 4 along the far right page. On the left side, panel 1 shows a girl standing under a waterfall in ascetic training, panel 2 shows inverted handstand practice in shallow water, panel 3 shows intense physical training on the ground, panel 4 shows 2 girls in a close emotional conversation. On the right side, panel 1 shows a composed rival girl in portrait close-up, panel 2 shows a roaring audience in stadium stands, panel 3 shows a small comedic rules diagram explaining the sport with 2 simplified girls and a skirt icon, panel 4 shows a shocked face close-up reaction. Render all text as authentic Japanese manga lettering and captions, including vertical title calligraphy, side narration boxes, crowd chants, rule panel labels, and large impact kanji; use the visible phrases as inspiration but do not prioritize perfect legibility. Add one oversized vertical title on the left page reading {argument name="attack name left" default="白鳥の湖"} and one huge central impact phrase on the right page reading {argument name="attack name right" default="倒立回転逆襲"}. Preserve the feeling of a fake magazine feature or serialized manga chapter discovered in print, with believable halftone dots, slightly worn page edges, high contrast black ink, and a humorous yet sincerely epic tone.

content: A full-body anime illustration of 3 humanoid AI assistant idol girls standing side by side on a glossy futuristic concert stage, shown in a straight-on front view with their full figures visible from head to shoes. They are designed as the same base android model with subtle personality differences expressed mainly through costume design, pose, and color balance rather than body type. All 3 have short silver-gray bob hair with soft waves, large over-ear mechanical headphones, pale skin, youthful idol styling, and sleek visible robotic limbs with glossy red-and-black plating and heart-shaped accent motifs. The setting is a large indoor live venue with steel truss rigging overhead, bright white and pink-purple stage spotlights, giant LED screens in the background, and reflective black stage flooring with glowing grid lines and mirror-like reflections. The overall mood is polished, cute, futuristic, and high-end, with dramatic concert lighting and crisp detailed rendering. The left girl wears a mostly black idol outfit with red accents: a cropped translucent black jacket over a short black dress or romper with a flared skirt, black armored thigh-high mechanical legs, chunky black platform boots, red gloves, and small heart details throughout; she stands with knees slightly inward and both hands pressed to her cheeks in a shy, affectionate pose, with a sweet blushing expression. The center girl wears a balanced red-and-white idol outfit: a white sleeveless top with red heart accents, a layered burgundy-red frilled mini skirt, fully exposed red-and-black robotic arms and legs, and red platform shoes; she stands in a neutral straight upright pose with one hand raised lightly near her face, presenting the clearest full-body view of the android construction. The right girl wears a mostly red idol dress with black lace-like detailing, a black waist belt, a flared skirt with white frilled underskirt, red-and-black knee armor, and red platform shoes; she stands elegantly with one arm bent near her chest and the other arm extended outward, as if introducing the audience. Keep the trio evenly spaced across the frame. Emphasize the contrast between soft idol fashion and hard mechanical anatomy, with 3 distinct costume variations in black-dominant, red-and-white balanced, and red-dominant palettes. Highly detailed anime key visual, ultra-clean linework, glossy materials, soft facial shading, sparkling highlights, cinematic stage atmosphere, and premium promotional art quality for the idol unit {argument name="group name" default="Hallucinations"}.

content: A manga-style character profile page in the dramatic visual language of a supernatural battle comic, printed on a slightly aged beige paper background with black ink outlines, dense hatching, and high-contrast cel shading. The composition features 3 main sections: a left information panel, a central full-body female character portrait, and a right-side humanoid stand figure with vertical Japanese dialogue text. In the center, depict a tall, athletic young Japanese woman, about {argument name="character age" default="22"} years old, with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair, tan healthy skin, and a muscular sporty physique. Her face is completely obscured by a large rectangular mosaic censor blur. She wears 3 visible outfit pieces: a tight white sweat-soaked tank top, very short dark navy athletic shorts with a drawstring, and no visible accessories. Her skin and clothes glisten with sweat, emphasizing a humid, sensual, intense training vibe. She stands in a confident forward-facing pose with one arm lowered toward the viewer, creating a slightly foreshortened perspective. Behind and to her right, show a sleek humanoid stand entity made of glossy pale lavender liquid with splashing droplets around its head and shoulders, narrow eyes, smooth organic armor-like anatomy, and 3 round purple orb details down the chest and abdomen. Add 2 large stylized purple Japanese sound effects in a hand-drawn manga font: one near the top reading "ゴゴゴ…" and one near the lower body reading "ゴゴゴゴ……". On the far right, place a vertical Japanese exclamation in black text: "オラオララッ！汗の一滴まで見逃されェ！". The left panel is a boxed black-on-beige character dossier with multiple horizontal dividers and Japanese text. Include these profile fields exactly as visible: "スタンド使い名:" followed by "{argument name="character name" default="水沢 咲良"}（ミズサワ サクラ）", "性別:" followed by "女", "見た目:" followed by "黒髪ロング、健康的な体つき スポーティな服装が多い", "年齢:" followed by "22歳", "身長:" followed by "160cm", and "職業:" followed by "フリーター ジムトレーナー". Below that, include a boxed radar chart titled "スタンド能力パラメーター" with 6 labeled stats around the graph: "破壊力 B", "スピード A", "射程距離 C", "成長性 B", "精密動作性 A", and durability at the remaining axis, with a purple filled polygon. At the bottom left, include another boxed text section with the stand name and ability description. The stand section should read: "スタンド名:" then "『{argument name="stand name" default="SWEAT BLOOM"}』" and below it "（スウェット・ブルーム）". Under "スタンドの能力:" include a dense Japanese paragraph describing a close-range stand activated by sweat and bodily fluids, able to manipulate surrounding moisture and alter the pressure and viscosity of liquids, dull an opponent's movement through sweat, make surfaces slippery to disrupt balance, and launch sweat like bullets at high speed. Overall style: gritty serialized manga splash page, dynamic sensual action-character design, JoJo-inspired exaggeration, clean page layout, detailed anatomy, purple accent color for stand effects and chart fill, no modern UI elements, full-page illustration.

content: A manga-style JoJo-inspired character card poster set in a narrow urban alley, with dramatic cel shading, heavy ink lines, stylized speed-line energy, and a vertical comic-page layout. The main subject is a young Japanese man, {argument name="character name" default="タカ・ハシ"}, age 19, shown from mid-thigh up in the left foreground, raising his right fist high in a triumphant pose while holding a handheld microphone near his mouth with his left hand. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular mosaic blur. He has short messy {argument name="hair color" default="green"} hair and wears a fitted green track jacket with gold side stripes and a large golden phoenix emblem across the chest, zipped up, with black pants and black fingerless gloves. To his right and slightly behind him stands his humanoid Stand, {argument name="stand name" default="サガミ・サヴァイブ (SAGAMI SURVIVE)"}, a compact armored mascot-like figure with a rounded pale yellow bird head, sharp angry eyes, an orange beak, and a sleek white-and-green mechanical body with metallic silver musculature. The Stand has green shoulder armor, green gauntlets, gold trim, and a bold letter S on each side of its chest armor. It is posed punching forward with both fists, aggressive and energetic. Include exactly 4 distinct text panels and effects: 1 large white rectangular description box at the top right filled with dense Japanese text explaining the Stand, 1 jagged white speech bubble at the mid-right with vertical Japanese battle cries, 1 white character-info box at the bottom left with Japanese profile text, and 1 white stat box at the bottom right containing a radar chart labeled STAND PARAMETERS with Japanese and English category labels and a 5-line stat list. Add exactly 4 stylized purple sound-effect texts around the figures: 1 large "ゴゴゴゴ…" near the upper middle, 1 "ド" near the lower left, and 2 separate "ドド" effects near the lower center and lower right. The background is a gray-blue city alley with tall buildings receding in perspective. Overall tone: parody homage to JoJo's Bizarre Adventure character introductions, combining comic intensity with a goofy mascot Stand concept, polished manga poster composition, sharp print-like detail, and Japanese magazine page aesthetics.

content: A full-page manga-style parody character profile illustration on an aged off-white paper background, designed like a JoJo-inspired stand user sheet with bold ink lines, cross-hatching, dramatic posing, and stylized Japanese text. The central figure is an anthropomorphic duck mascot athlete standing in a confident forward stride, pointing directly at the viewer with one gloved hand and clenching the other fist. He has a large round pale-yellow duck head with a bright orange beak, huge glossy black eyes, and a fierce determined expression with furrowed brows. His body is human-like and athletic, wearing a dark green sleeveless soccer jersey over a white undershirt, white shorts, black shoes with teal laces, and yellow-and-black horizontal striped knee-high socks. Around his neck hangs a lanyard with an ID badge showing a small portrait icon of the duck mascot and the text “No.001”. The jersey has 4 visible sponsor-style patches and labels: “農協牛乳”, “今野硝子工業”, “相模福祉村”, and a small crest marked “SC'S”. Behind him stands his humanoid Stand, a tall muscular armored figure with a metallic olive-gold body, a heart-shaped chest emblem, narrow intimidating eyes, and a raised fist, surrounded by jagged purple spiritual flames. Add 4 large purple manga sound effect texts around the figures, each reading “ゴゴ…”, with one near the upper left of the Stand and 3 stacked vertically along the left side of the mascot. On the left side of the page, include a profile text column with 6 horizontal rule-separated lines of Japanese text: “スタンド使い名: ガミティ”, “性別: 男”, “見た目: ダチョウのマスコット”, “年齢: 不明”, “身長: 175cm”, and “職業: マスコット / PR活動”. On the right side, place a large spiky speech bubble filled with bold vertical Japanese text: “オラオラオラオラオラ！ 前に出るぞ！絶対に負けねェーッ！ 相模原・共に行こうぜェーッ！”. Below that, add a lower-right information block with a heading “スタンド名:『オオサガミ・オオオォ！』” and a smaller subtitle “(SC相模原チャント「オオサガミオオオォー！」より)”, followed by a paragraph headed “スタンド能力:” describing an emotional amplification power in dense Japanese body text. In the lower left corner, include a purple-filled radar chart with 6 axes labeled in Japanese: “破壊力 B”, “スピード B”, “射程距離 D”, “成長性 C”, “精密動作性 C”, and “持続力 C”. Composition should feel like a dramatic manga magazine character introduction page, with the mascot in front, the Stand looming behind, strong foreshortening, dynamic comic-book energy, and a humorous contrast between a cute sports mascot and an overwhelmingly serious supernatural battle presentation.

content: A retro 1980s Japanese manga magazine cover illustration with a faded paper texture, slightly grainy print look, and warm vintage ink colors. The composition is crowded and playful, set against a deep blue-purple background filled with fluffy pink clouds and floating pink hearts. At the top left, a huge dramatic Japanese title in bold hand-drawn lettering reads {argument name="headline text" default="危険な恋愛手引書"}, with a smaller subtitle beneath it reading （ラブ・バイブル）. In the center, a tall delinquent-style teenage boy in a dark gakuran school uniform points toward the viewer with one hand, confident and charismatic. Beside him at center-right is a sweet shoujo-style teenage girl with a short dark-brown bob haircut, large sparkling eyes, and a cream sailor-style school uniform with a pink collar and bow, looking up in surprise and admiration. At lower left sits 1 gothic-lolita girl with pale lavender twin-tail hair, black ribbon accessories, and an elaborate black-and-pink frilly dress, blushing shyly with her hands near her mouth. At the bottom center is 1 fluffy black toy poodle wearing a mint-blue polka-dot scarf, facing forward with a cute expression and tongue slightly out. In the upper center-right, 1 tiny cupid girl with black twin ponytails, white wings, a pink pleated skirt, white socks, and a flower hair accessory flies while reading a pink book with a heart on the cover. In the upper right background, 1 panicked bespectacled schoolboy in a blue uniform clutches his head with bulging comedic eyes. Near the right-middle background stands 1 glamorous older woman in warm orange clothing, partially obscured by the main pair. At the far right is 1 dramatic villain-queen woman in glossy black armor-like corset attire, long black gloves, a high red-lined cape, and a gold crown, posing with one hand lifted. At the bottom right, an enormous open book rises diagonally into the frame, as if all the characters are emerging from its pages. Use dynamic manga cover composition, exaggerated expressions, romantic-comedy energy, hand-painted cel anime shading, and nostalgic weekly-magazine poster design.

content: Dance Sequence Instruction Sheet [VISUAL STYLE] A composition featuring a highly detailed 3D-rendered female dancer. Designed like a professional choreography guide with a technical, diagram-inspired layout. Clean white background, soft studio lighting, and strong contrast to highlight body movement and posture. [GRID LAYOUT] Structured 4×4 panel grid (16 frames total), evenly spaced with thin black divider lines. Each panel is identical in size and clearly numbered from 1 to 16 to show a continuous dance progression. [CHARACTER] Use image1 as the base character. The same female dancer appears consistently across all panels with accurate likeness and proportions. [WARDROBE] The dancer wears a stylish, performance-ready outfit: a well-fitted top paired with a short, flowy skirt. The look should feel modern and visually appealing while still practical for dance movement. Fabric should subtly respond to motion (slight flow and folds), even in grayscale. [PANEL STRUCTURE – EACH FRAME] Top-left: Step number + short dance move title (e.g., “Step 5 – Spin Transition”) Center: Full-body pose capturing a precise moment in the choreography Bottom-left: 3–4 lines of concise instruction describing the move Overlay: Motion arrows and directional guides illustrating how the dancer transitions [MOTION INDICATORS] Incorporate curved arrows for fluid motion, straight arrows for directional steps, and circular indicators for spins or turns. Emphasize rhythm, weight shifts, and body isolation. [RENDER QUALITY] High-detail sculpted 3D style with smooth grayscale shading, subtle shadows, and clean linework. Maintain a polished, concept-art level finish with clarity in every pose. [RESTRICTIONS] No color, no background scenery, no extra characters, no visual clutter, only the dancer and instructional elements.

Her skin is fair and delicate, with exquisite features and clear, bright blue eyes, expressing a cool and elegant demeanor. Her long black hair flows significantly in the wind with detailed highlights. She wears a golden hollowed-out classical crown adorned with ruby and turquoise jewelry. A large, flowing landscape painting-style scroll surrounds the character in an elegant S-shaped composition. The {argument name="background" default="background is a deep blue night courtyard"}, with blooming white cherry blossom branches extending into the frame from above and petals falling in the wind. In the upper right, there is a warm golden backlight passing through the flowers and hair, creating a soft halo, rim lighting, and air particles. The foreground is dotted with sparkling blue flowers. The overall style is dreamy, gorgeous, and ethereal, with a high-end 2D thick-painting texture, cinematic lighting, cool and warm contrast, and exquisite details. Aspect ratio 9:16, no text, watermarks, or logos.
title: Oriental Fantasy Illustration Prompt
description: A detailed prompt for creating ethereal Oriental fantasy illustrations featuring a character in traditional attire surrounded by landscape elements and cherry blossoms.

content: A gritty black-and-white hard-boiled manga page in a high-contrast ink wash style, arranged as a single comic page with 9 distinct panels of varying sizes and diagonal borders. The main subject is a mysterious adult woman with {argument name="hair color" default="black"} long messy hair, a curvy build, an off-shoulder dark knit dress or sweater, a choker necklace, and dangling cross earrings, portrayed as a noir antiheroine. Her face is intentionally obscured by shadow, blur, or framing in multiple panels, giving her an anonymous and dangerous presence. The page uses dramatic brush textures, rain-soaked urban grime, splattered ink, heavy blacks, and cinematic lighting. Panel 1 at the top left shows a nighttime city skyline under rain with glowing windows and the vertical Japanese narration text: 「この街はいつも雨が降っている」. Panel 2 at the top center is a bust portrait of the woman facing forward, hair spilling across her shoulders, with her face obscured. Panel 3 at the top right shows her from behind walking down a narrow alley or wet street, with the vertical text: 「あたしの名前は誰も知らない」. Panel 4 in the middle left is an extreme close-up of one eye with the vertical text: 「知ってるのは裏の顔だけ」. Panel 5 in the middle center-left shows an overhead urban scene of buildings or city blocks with the vertical text: 「金と嘘と裏切りがこの街のルール」. Panel 6 in the middle center-right shows a close-up of hands, money, or a violent underworld exchange with the vertical text: 「でもあたしはそのルールの外側で生きてる」. Panel 7 in the middle right is a dark partial close-up of the woman in shadow with the vertical text: 「守るものなんか最初からなかった」. Panel 8 at the lower left is a medium shot of the woman standing with folded arms, with the vertical text: 「あるのは譲れないたったひとつの信念だけ」, and below it a small inset panel of 2 people seated at a bar counter at night with bottles and dim lights, accompanied by the vertical text: 「夜が明けるまでに片をつける」. Panel 9, the dominant lower-right panel, shows the woman aiming a handgun directly at the viewer in extreme foreshortening, hair whipping, body angled forward, with bold large vertical Japanese text split across the panel: 「あたしの正義は」 and 「あたしが決める」. Keep all visible text in Japanese exactly as written. Emphasize a seinen crime manga aesthetic, hard-boiled female vigilante energy, wet neon-noir atmosphere, rough pen lines, ink splatter, and dramatic panel composition.
title: Hard-Boiled Noir Manga Woman Page
description: A dramatic black-and-white manga page featuring a mysterious female vigilante in a rain-soaked crime noir setting, ideal for generating cinematic seinen comic art.

content: A serene Japanese tea room rendered as a refined monochrome ink-and-wash illustration on aged parchment, with soft sepia-gray tones, delicate brush textures, and precise hand-drawn linework. On the right side, a humanoid {argument name="robot type" default="service robot"} kneels in seiza on tatami mats, its smooth white shell and exposed mechanical joints depicted with elegant technical detail, gently bowing its head as it pours hot tea from a cast-iron teapot into a small ceramic cup. The robot wears a simple cloth apron tied at the waist, blending traditional tea ceremony etiquette with futuristic machinery. In the center foreground, a low black wooden tea table holds exactly 5 visible tea objects: 1 dark ceramic vase with a thin branch of sparse leaves, 1 bamboo whisk standing upright, 1 tea bowl, 1 small teacup on a round tray, and 1 cast-iron teapot in the robot’s hands. A faint curl of steam rises from the freshly poured tea. Behind the table, a hanging scroll displays a single enso circle painted in expressive brushwork. On the left, tall shoji screens diffuse soft daylight across the room. The walls are plain plaster with subtle wear and ink-like stains, and the overall composition is calm, balanced, minimalist, and contemplative, combining wabi-sabi Japanese aesthetics with quiet science-fiction. Use a wide cinematic composition, eye-level perspective, lots of negative space, and a meditative mood.
title: Zen Tea Ceremony Robot
description: A minimalist sepia ink-style scene of a humanoid robot performing a Japanese tea ceremony, ideal for generating poetic sci-fi editorial art or atmospheric concept imagery.

content: A whimsical handcrafted clay diorama of a {argument name="scene theme" default="night market on the moon"}, photographed like a miniature cinematic set. The ground is dusty gray lunar soil with small craters and uneven texture, and the background is a deep black sky scattered with many tiny warm-white stars plus one visible cratered moon in the upper left. Show 5 small astronauts in chunky vintage-style white spacesuits with rounded helmets and dark glossy visors, posed as market vendors and customers. Build 4 rustic market stalls from rough wood poles and stone-like counters, each topped with draped fabric canopies in muted blue-gray or rusty red tones. Hang warm glowing orange paper lanterns from the stalls and string 6 round bulbs across the back of the market, creating a cozy contrast against the cold lunar setting. In the left foreground, place a large stall with 2 astronauts: 1 vendor behind the counter serving food from bowls and trays, and 1 customer with a backpack facing the stall. In the mid-background, place 2 smaller stalls with 1 astronaut standing between or near them as if browsing or buying. In the right foreground, place 1 red-canopy stall filled with breads, pastries, jars, and baskets. Near the center front, add a rough circular stone table with 4 low round stools; one astronaut sits beside it holding a cup or bowl, and the tabletop holds 4 small plates or food groupings. Scatter several foil-wrapped silver cargo crates around the scene, including 1 in the left foreground and a cluster on the right side. The overall style should feel tactile and handmade, like stop-motion puppets and sculpted clay miniatures, with detailed textures, warm practical lighting from lanterns, shallow depth of field, and a charming, surreal blend of space exploration and cozy street food market.
title: Clay Astronaut Moon Market
description: A cozy handcrafted miniature scene of astronauts running a lantern-lit food market on the moon, ideal for whimsical editorial art or imaginative concept imagery.

content: Using the provided reference photo, recreate the same museum facade and frontal composition as a polished theatrical anime background illustration. Keep the architecture, signage, 3 flagpoles, broad steps, and overall layout consistent, but convert the image from realistic photography into a highly detailed hand-painted anime film style with clean linework, soft cel shading, gentle pastel stone colors, and crisp atmospheric lighting. Add dramatic sunlight from the upper right so the glass pyramid casts a large geometric lattice shadow across the central wall and left side of the entrance. Simplify and stylize the people into anime background characters, keeping the 2 visible groups: 1 lone figure on the left and 1 small cluster of 7 people near the center-right entrance. Preserve the clear blue-sky daytime mood while making the scene feel elegant, refined, and cinematic.
title: Anime Museum Background Conversion
description: This prompt transforms a reference photo of a museum building into a detailed theatrical anime-style background while preserving the original composition and adding cinematic sunlight and stylized figures.

content: A cinematic dark fantasy anime illustration in a ruined gothic cathedral, vertical composition. Show a lone female android-like warrior from behind, centered slightly low in frame, kneeling or sitting back on her heels on a reflective stone floor. She has extremely long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silver white"} hair spreading across the floor and air, a sleek black blindfold visor covering her eyes, and a black high-cut gothic combat dress with elegant straps, long black opera gloves, and thigh-high black boots. Her physique is slim and graceful. She holds 1 large ornate sword upright in front of her, with both hands resting on the hilt, the blade planted on the ground like a memorial. The sword has a dark blade and a decorative gold ring-like guard near the handle. The atmosphere is solemn, tragic, and reverent. Place 3 tall pointed arched windows in the background, glowing with cold white backlight through haze and dust. Include 4 stone angel statues total: 2 larger angels in the left background and 2 in the right background, partially obscured by fog and darkness. Fill the air with drifting ash, snow-like particles, black debris fragments, and a few faint orange embers near the floor. Use dramatic volumetric light rays, soft bloom, smoky mist, high contrast, and a desaturated palette of charcoal gray, silver, blue-gray, and black. The scene should feel like a memorial after a battle, highly detailed, ultra-polished, melancholic, ethereal, and game key art inspired by {argument name="franchise title" default="NieR:Automata"}. Add 1 vertical Japanese title inscription near the lower left reading {argument name="vertical text" default="儚き夢と共にあれ"}, with 1 small vertical English subtitle beside it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="NieR:Automata"}.
title: Gothic Android Warrior Cathedral Key Art
description: This prompt generates a moody, high-detail anime game-poster illustration of a blindfolded female warrior in a ruined cathedral, ideal for dark fantasy key art and dramatic character posters.

content: A cinematic anime-style illustration of a quiet rural Japanese train station in early summer, filled with travel nostalgia and bright midday light. In the foreground, one high school girl stands alone on the platform near the left side of the frame, facing slightly toward the viewer with a shy, gentle posture, her legs together and one foot angled inward. She has {argument name="hair color" default="black"} short bobbed hair with soft bangs, and wears a classic Japanese sailor school uniform: a white long-sleeved sailor blouse with navy trim, a vivid red neckerchief, a dark navy pleated skirt, white socks, and dark brown loafers. She holds a dark school bag in one hand at her side. Her expression should feel calm, a little wistful, as if she was just about to speak before the train arrived. Place her beside an old weathered wooden station building with large windowpanes and a simple wooden bench. Above her is 1 hanging station sign reading {argument name="station name" default="山ノ下駅"}, with smaller romanized text “YAMANOSHITA” and small local line information beneath it. The right half of the image opens to 1 set of railway tracks receding into the distance, bordered by lush green grass and wildflowers, with 1 small local train approaching from far down the line. Add a few utility poles running alongside the tracks. In the deep background, show a dramatic mountain range with lingering snow on the peaks under a vivid blue sky with scattered white clouds. Composition should balance the girl on the left and the railway perspective on the right, with detailed background scenery, crisp sunlight, soft anime rendering, realistic textures in the station wood and rails, and a heartfelt slice-of-life travel mood.
title: Rural Station Schoolgirl Scene
description: This prompt generates a nostalgic anime-style countryside station scene with a lone schoolgirl, ideal for slice-of-life travel illustrations and atmospheric character art.

content:
A cinematic, ultra-realistic night scene of a {argument name="artist" default="young male street artist"} painting a large-scale {argument name="mural subject" default="mural of a woman’s face"} in a {argument name="setting" default="narrow urban alley"}. The camera angle is slightly low, creating a dramatic, powerful perspective. The artist has medium-length, slightly messy dark hair and light stubble or a short beard, giving him a rugged, creative look.

He wears a loose white t-shirt and casual jeans, slightly oversized, with a relaxed streetwear vibe. His posture is focused and engaged as he stands close to the wall, actively spray-painting.

He is creating a massive, hyper-realistic mural of a woman’s face on a textured brick wall. The mural is incredibly detailed—smooth skin tones, realistic lighting, expressive eyes, and glossy lips—appearing almost like a photograph. Fine mist from the spray paint is visible in the air, catching light and adding motion and atmosphere.

The setting is a narrow urban alley at night, surrounded by tall buildings. The environment is gritty and textured—aged brick walls, paint splashes, subtle grime, and urban wear. Neon signs and distant streetlights cast vibrant reflections in teal, magenta, and blue tones, creating a cinematic, slightly cyberpunk mood.

Lighting is dramatic and layered: cool ambient light fills the alley, while warmer neon highlights create contrast. A subtle rim light outlines the artist’s silhouette, separating him from the dark background. The mural is partially illuminated, acting as a strong focal point.

Atmosphere includes light fog or mist, enhancing depth and making the lighting glow softly. The scene feels immersive, quiet, and artistically intense.

Depth of field is moderately shallow: the artist and mural are in sharp focus, while the background fades into soft blur with bokeh highlights.

Style: hyper-realistic, cinematic photography, street art aesthetic, ultra-detailed textures, high dynamic range, subtle film grain.

Camera details: 35mm or 50mm lens, f/1.8–f/2.8 aperture, low-light photography, slight low-angle shot, natural perspective.

Composition: vertical frame (4:5 or 9:16), subject slightly off-center, mural dominating the frame for strong visual storytelling.
Generate image using uploaded image as reference
title: Urban Alley Mural Artist
description: A cinematic, low-angle night scene prompt depicting a street artist painting a hyper-realistic mural in a gritty urban alley with neon lighting.

content: Using the provided reference image, transform the top-down RPG town map into a polished anime-style event illustration from a human eye-level perspective. Keep the same village location and layout cues: the central stone well, the path network, the hedges, the wooden houses, and the narrow water canal on the left. Convert the 2 small sprite characters by the well into 2 full-size fantasy characters in the foreground: a silver-haired mage in a purple robe holding a staff, and a blonde elf in green-and-brown adventurer clothing, both leaning over and looking into the well. Add a cinematic JRPG feel with soft daylight, detailed painterly rendering, clean line art, and gentle depth of field. Preserve the sense that this scene is taking place in the same town square, but enrich it with natural perspective, more environmental detail, and 5 background villagers: 1 man cropped at the far left edge, 2 small figures standing on the center path in the distance, and 2 townspeople talking near the right-side buildings.

Her hands are clasped gently near her chest in a shy, elegant pose. content: A highly detailed anime-style urban fantasy illustration set at a busy Tokyo-style scramble crossing on a bright clear day, viewed at street level with a wide cinematic composition. The city blends modern realism with mythic fantasy: dense high-rise buildings covered in giant billboards, a red broadcast tower in the middle distance, blue sky with fluffy clouds, and a crowded crosswalk full of pedestrians. In the foreground, show 7 prominent character figures: a silver-haired elf woman in a flowing white dress holding an iced drink and tote bag on the far left; a central schoolgirl with long dark hair, black animal ears, a navy school blazer, plaid skirt, blue ribbon, and large navy shoulder bag, lifting one hand to her head; a young man in a dark suit looking down at a smartphone; an androgynous white-haired angelic figure in an elegant white-and-gold ceremonial outfit with large white wings; a small blonde girl in an ornate pastel pink frilled dress beside the angel; a dark-haired woman in a black coat in right foreground profile; and a small blue-haired cat-eared child in a blue dress with a bow standing near a cave entrance on the right. In the midground crowd, include mixed humans and fantasy races walking together naturally. Add 4 clearly visible nonhuman or supernatural background beings: 1 dragon flying in the sky, 1 winged female angel descending above the street, 1 lizard-headed businessman in a suit near the angelic figure, and 1 tall red-skinned horned demon with crossed arms standing by the hillside path. On the right side, transition the city into a lush shrine hillside with large green trees, a red torii gate, stone steps, and a wooden signboard reading Japanese kanji. Below it, place a rocky cave-like tunnel entrance glowing blue, with a wooden sign over the entrance and several figures descending into an underground shared district lit by crystals. Show 6 major billboard/sign elements across the cityscape: a huge left billboard reading "Shinpi Sekai 神秘世界" with a cosmic planet image; a large central political poster with Japanese text and a raised fist icon; 2 rooftop signs reading "未来研究所" on separate buildings; a large right billboard with Japanese text about coexistence and silhouettes of different beings; and 1 vertical banner with Japanese text on a nearby building. Emphasize the theme of coexistence between ordinary modern city life and hidden fantasy societies. Crisp anime linework, polished light novel key visual rendering, rich textures, soft sunlight, subtle atmospheric perspective, vibrant but believable colors, intricate clothing details, and a sense of awe, everyday bustle, and worldbuilding depth.
title: Urban Fantasy Coexistence Crossing
description: This prompt generates a detailed anime key visual of a modern city intersection where humans, angels, demons, elves, and beastfolk coexist, ideal for fantasy worldbuilding or light novel setting art.

content: A wide cinematic anime key visual of a bustling modern Tokyo-like district transformed into a multicultural fantasy metropolis under a bright blue midday sky with fluffy clouds. The scene is viewed from street level along a broad pedestrian avenue leading toward a large red torii gate at the center distance, with stone steps, crowds of people, dense commercial buildings, and a Japanese castle rising on a green hill behind the city blocks. A very tall broadcasting tower resembling Tokyo Skytree stands slightly right of center in the background. Fill the sky with exactly 8 airborne fantasy and sci-fi elements: 2 large dragons in flight, 2 winged humanoid angels, 1 huge flying saucer, and 3 smaller UFOs scattered farther away. The city should feel like a coexistence society where humans and fantasy races live together naturally. Add many colorful digital billboards and vertical signs on buildings, including Japanese text and fantasy character advertisements; the largest curved screen on the left should display the text “Shinpi Sekai 神秘世界 ようこそ,” and a lower billboard should reference a multicultural society of different races. In the foreground, place exactly 6 prominent characters across the street scene: on the far left, a tall elf schoolgirl with long brown hair, pointed ears, a white blouse, ribbon tie, and plaid skirt; left-center, a humanoid crocodile or lizard man in casual urban clothes with a jacket and pendant; near him, a small child with animal-like ears wearing a red backpack and scarf; center-left, a white-haired young man with white feathered wings in a light jacket; center-right, a silver-haired cat-eared schoolgirl in a light jacket and dark pleated skirt; right-center, a black-haired teenage boy in a black hoodie with a backpack; and on the far right, a blonde elf schoolgirl with pointed ears, white short-sleeve shirt, tie, and brown plaid skirt. In the midground and background, add a crowd of pedestrians including a few more fantasy species. Also include exactly 3 additional perched or elevated fantasy figures on the right side architecture: 1 dark-clad black-winged girl standing on a ledge, 1 small blonde fairy-like winged girl floating near a rooftop, and 1 tiny golden winged creature near the street. Style: polished high-detail anime illustration, light novel promotional art, sharp linework, vibrant colors, clean atmospheric perspective, crisp sunlight, soft shadows, highly detailed urban signage, a sense of wonder, coexistence, and worldbuilding.

content: A stunning anime theatrical movie poster in portrait format. Studio Ghibli meets Makoto Shinkai visual language. A teenage girl in a tattered white shrine maiden robe stands on the wing of a crumbling giant stone deity — an ancient colossus covered in moss and glowing golden kanji script, slowly falling through a sea of clouds. Her long black hair streams upward against gravity. She reaches one hand toward the sky where a vast celestial rift tears open the heavens — beyond it, an inverted ocean floats above the clouds, ancient wooden cities hanging upside down from its surface, lanterns drifting like stars. The sky transitions from deep twilight blue at the bottom to a luminous peach and rose gold at the top. Volumetric god rays pierce through cloud layers. Cherry blossom petals and torn paper talismans spiral everywhere. Her expression is calm determination. Art style: hand-drawn 2D animation, ultra-detailed background painting, expressive linework, rich cel shading. Palette: deep indigo, peach, rose gold, warm amber, soft white. Title in large elegant {argument name="language" default="Japanese kanji"} at the bottom with English subtitle beneath in a clean modern font. Tagline in small white italic text above the title. Mood: mythological, spiritual, bittersweet wonder. Theatrical release quality, Toho Films.

description: A lush anime-style movie poster prompt combining the aesthetics of Studio Ghibli and Makoto Shinkai, featuring mystical elements like floating cities and stone colossi.

content: Using the technique of abstractly expressing characters' emotions through dance, as seen in recently developed Indian cinema dance scenes, create a video portraying the anti-foreigner (Jo-i) enthusiasm of attackers like Shinsaku Takasugi just before the burning of the British Legation on January 31, 1863, set in an Edo town with a Western film atmosphere. Characters should be based on internet research of actual historical figures, with their features emphasized to look like characters in a period drama. To avoid rejection by video generation services, do not include sexual expressions, violence, or elements similar to existing works. The image quality should be a realistic photo from a 1980s live-action Japanese film. Conceive a storyboard and generate 8 landscape images (16:9 aspect ratio) for each shot from Start frame to End frame for Seedance 2.0. n=8. Be bold and comedic, using close-ups effectively. 1980s Japanese cinema look, shot on 35mm motion picture film. Photochemical texture, organic grain, subtle halation, soft highlight roll-off, slightly lifted blacks, realistic contrast, no digital sharpness, no HDR. Use a 35mm cinema camera with vintage spherical prime lenses. Lens style: 28mm, 35mm, 50mm, 85mm; mostly 35mm and 50mm for dialogue and observational framing. 24 fps, 180-degree shutter, restrained handheld and tripod shots, slow deliberate movement. Lighting is naturalistic and practical: mixed fluorescent and tungsten interior lighting, slightly underexposed, soft shadows, realistic skin tones. Color palette is subdued and earthy: brown, beige, olive, cream, muted red, with a slight yellow-green fluorescent cast. Film stock look inspired by Kodak Eastman 5247 / 5294. The overall feeling is intimate, understated, dryly comic, realistic, and melancholic, like a Japanese feature film from the 1980s. A video expressing the Jo-i spirit of the attackers like Takasugi Shinsaku just before the burning of the British Legation on January 31, 1863, in an Edo town with a Western atmosphere, using techniques from Indian cinema dance scenes. A musical film with no dialogue. A flashy, up-tempo song like an Indian movie dance scene.

content: A whimsical cinematic portrait of an anthropomorphic neuron riding on the outside step of a classic San Francisco cable car at golden hour. The character has a large neuron head with a rounded central body and dozens of long branching dendrites radiating outward like a crown, textured in pale lavender, mauve, and fleshy gray with subtle organic sheen. Its face area is obscured and featureless. The figure is dressed like a Victorian or Edwardian gentleman commuter: dark tweed jacket, patterned waistcoat, collared shirt, necktie, pinstriped trousers, polished brown leather shoes, and a pocket watch chain. One hand grips a brass pole on the cable car, and the other hand holds up a vintage transit ticket reading "MUNICIPAL RAILWAY SAN FRANCISCO ADMIT ONE." Add a small round lapel pin that says "MUNI." A slender purple tail-like axon curls behind the body. The cable car is richly detailed varnished wood and brass, with a route sign on the side reading "POWELL AND MARKET / HYDE AND BEACH / FISHERMANS WHARF." In the background, show a steep San Francisco street with cable tracks descending into the distance, a second cable car far down the hill, dense urban buildings on both sides, and Coit Tower visible on a hazy hilltop. Warm nostalgic lighting, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed textures, surreal realism, humorous but elegant mood, centered full-body composition, vertical framing.

content: A vast cinematic sci-fi megacity at sunset, viewed from a high observation platform between colossal dark metallic skyscrapers. The sky glows with dramatic orange, gold, and rose clouds, with the sun low on the horizon casting warm light across an immense futuristic city that stretches into the distance above layers of mist and clouds. Count exactly 1 large hovering megastructure dominating the upper-right center, suspended over the city like a massive floating platform, surrounded by countless ultra-tall needle-like towers and luminous urban density below. Include exactly 1 foreground landing deck on the lower left with a small group of tiny human silhouettes standing near the edge, and exactly 1 sleek spacecraft departing from that platform with bright blue engine trails streaking diagonally outward. Scatter multiple small flying vehicles across the sky at varying distances, all dwarfed by the architecture. Frame the composition with dark structural elements on the far left and far right to create depth, as if looking out from inside a futuristic tower corridor or balcony. Style is hyper-detailed concept art, epic scale, atmospheric perspective, reflective metal surfaces, intricate city lights, volumetric clouds, subtle haze, dramatic contrast between warm sunset light and cool blue technological accents, ultra cinematic, grand futuristic utopia, highly polished digital matte painting.
title: Futuristic Sunset Megacity
description: This prompt generates an epic cinematic sci-fi cityscape at golden hour, ideal for concept art, wallpapers, and futuristic worldbuilding visuals.

content: A dreamy, cinematic fantasy illustration in vertical poster format, showing {argument name="celebrity model" default="Liu Yifei"} in side profile walking barefoot across a perfectly still midnight-blue lake under a luminous full moon and a richly detailed star-filled sky with the Milky Way stretching diagonally behind her. She is a graceful East Asian woman with shoulder-length dark hair, wearing a shimmering silver sleeveless evening gown with a flowing skirt and a thigh slit, the fabric sparkling like stardust. Her expression is calm and introspective, and she faces to the right as one foot touches the water, creating delicate glowing ripples. Two small dark islands sit low on the horizon, one on each side, emphasizing the vast open water and sky. A glowing vine of soft white roses and petals wraps around her body in an elegant S-curve, beginning behind her upper back, spiraling around her waist and legs, and continuing downward into the reflection. Beneath the water, instead of a normal reflection, create a large luminous line-art tiger formed from fine white neon-like contours, upside down relative to the woman above, with its body curled dynamically and its head near a large glowing white rose at the lower right; the tiger should feel majestic, lean, and ethereal rather than aggressive. The overall palette is cool blue, silver, and white, with gentle moonlight, soft bloom, mirror-like reflections, magical realism, ultra-clean composition, high detail, romantic fantasy mood. Add elegant cursive text centered near the bottom that reads {argument name="quote" default="In me the tiger sniffs the rose."}, plus one small four-point star icon near the lower right corner. Make it refined, poetic, and visually symbolic of inner strength and tenderness.
title: Moonlit Tiger and Rose Fantasy Poster
description: This prompt generates a poetic vertical fantasy poster of a moonlit woman on water with a glowing tiger reflection and rose vine, ideal for artistic quote imagery and symbolic AI art.

content: A vibrant Japanese comic-style cover illustration with two anime characters standing side by side against a split pink-and-blue pop graphic background filled with stars, dots, music notes, hearts, spark lines, and playful doodles. At the top, place a huge bold Japanese title in thick black and brown kanji with white outline and pink shadow reading 夜坂さんと茶藤くん, arranged in an energetic layered composition inside a fluffy cloud-like title shape. The left half of the background is pink and the right half is light blue, with a diagonal dividing rhythm and decorative manga-cover accents. Show exactly 2 characters from about mid-thigh up. On the left is a rebellious teenage girl with a straight black bob haircut and blunt bangs, pale skin, punk-rock fashion, and a slightly annoyed withdrawn pose with one hand near her mouth. She wears an oversized black zip hoodie over a red-and-black horizontal striped shirt, a red plaid pleated skirt, fishnet stockings, and a black heart-shaped choker. She holds a black electric bass guitar vertically across her body, with visible tuning pegs, strings, pickups, and chrome hardware. On the right is a cheerful teenage boy with messy light brown hair, fair skin, and a friendly expressive pose. He wears a white button-up shirt with sleeves rolled to the elbows, a fitted black vest with a small emblem on the chest, and black slacks. He holds a stylus pen near his face in one hand and a dark drawing tablet tucked in the other arm. Add exactly 2 vertical Japanese speech balloons: on the left, うるさいのはキライ。 in a pink outlined balloon; on the right, そのセンスもっとみんなに届けたいです… in a blue outlined balloon. Include small floating icons between and around them: exactly 2 black music notes, 2 pink hearts, 2 blue stars, and a few curved arrows and spark marks suggesting lively chemistry. The overall style is polished modern manga cover art, clean linework, glossy shading, expressive character design, bright pastel pop palette, high detail, commercial light novel or comic serialization cover aesthetic.

content: Anime style medium shot of a large pot of tonkotsu broth simmering on a stove. The broth is thick, creamy, and golden white. A ladle scoops up the rich broth showing its silky texture. Dense steam rises dramatically. Deep warm tones, atmospheric kitchen background slightly blurred, 16:9. Anime style medium shot of a chef placing sliced chashu pork onto a ramen bowl with chopsticks. Bowl filled with golden broth and noodles. Soft-boiled egg and nori being arranged. Chef’s focused expression partially visible. Warm golden overhead light, shallow depth of field on the bowl, 16:9. Anime style dramatic shot of golden tonkotsu broth being poured from a ladle into a ramen bowl that already has noodles arranged in it. The broth streams down in a smooth arc, splashing gently as it fills the bowl. Steam explodes upward on contact. Low angle, warm backlighting, 16:9. Anime style epic hero shot of a perfect bowl of tonkotsu ramen from a low angle with dramatic golden backlighting creating a halo. Chashu, runny egg, green onions, nori, sesame seeds, chili oil drizzle. Steam rising in artistic swirls. Sparkle and glow effects like an anime food reveal moment, 16:9.

content: A dynamic anime action illustration in a comedic chibi style, showing a tiny but fierce girl performing a powerful Chinese martial arts shoulder strike, tetsuzankou, into the side of a startled boy. The girl is the main focus: {argument name="character name" default="red-haired martial artist girl"}, with long vivid {argument name="hair color" default="crimson red"} hair streaming violently backward, sharp red eyes, and a determined angry expression. She is lunging from right to left at extreme speed, body low and compact, one shoulder and upper back driving into the boy’s torso, one fist pulled back and the other arm tucked for balance, with one knee bent forward and one leg trailing behind. She wears a short red Chinese-style qipao dress with gold floral embroidery, gold trim, side slit, and black flat shoes. The boy is a chibi black-haired teenager in a dark navy Chinese kung fu outfit with gold piping and black shoes, recoiling from the impact with a shocked open mouth, blank white eyes, sweat drops, and his body thrown backward to the left. Emphasize the exact moment of collision with a bright explosive impact burst at his side, flying debris, sparks, and strong speed-line distortion across the entire background. Add dust clouds and ground streaks near the girl’s trailing foot to show explosive forward momentum. Use a manga-inspired composition with exaggerated motion, foreshortening, and a diagonal rush from lower right to upper left. Include 3 large Japanese sound-effect text elements integrated into the art: one vertical right-side callout reading "鉄山靠!!", one smaller vertical annotation beside it reading "てつざんこう", and one large lower-left impact sound effect reading "ドガッ!!". The overall mood is fast, funny, aggressive, and high-impact, with polished modern anime rendering, glossy hair highlights, crisp line art, and dramatic red-white-black contrast.
title: Chibi Tetsuzankou Impact Attack
description: A high-energy chibi anime action scene of a red-haired girl delivering a dramatic shoulder strike, ideal for manga-style martial arts illustrations and comedic combat visuals.

content: A refined anime illustration of a tall adult oni woman in a calm, elegant full-body portrait, standing in three-quarter view with her hands folded over the pommel of a large upright sword. She has very long straight {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} hair flowing past her knees, pale skin, pointed elf-like ears, narrow crimson eyes, and two smooth curved red horns rising from her forehead. Her expression is cool, aloof, and slightly melancholic. She wears a {argument name="outfit style" default="white ceremonial kimono with black and red accents"}: a fitted white dress-like inner layer with a deep neckline, a black obi and layered waist ornaments, a translucent patterned outer robe with subtle geometric motifs, wide sleeves lined in red, and a short skirt hem decorated with smoky dark flame shapes. Her forearms are covered in polished silver armor gauntlets, adding a warrior feel. The sword is oversized and heavy, planted vertically before her, with a black blade and hilt, metallic guard, and vivid glowing red flame-like patterns running down the center. The composition is graceful and balanced, mixing Japanese traditional aesthetics with dark fantasy. The background is a soft pale lavender-gray decorative collage with a circular window framing Mount Fuji and a winding river landscape, delicate floral silhouettes and blooming branches, abstract cloud motifs, hanging tassel ornaments, geometric textile patterns, and a red sun-like circle on the right. Use muted whites, lilacs, gray-violets, black, and deep crimson as the main palette. Add subtle paper texture, clean linework, soft cel shading, delicate highlights, and an ornate high-detail anime style. Make the overall mood serene, noble, mystical, and slightly ominous, like {argument name="character name" default="Oni Alter"} in a luxurious Japanese fantasy key visual.

content: A cinematic medieval shot-reverse-shot pair presented as a gritty historical film still in an ultrawide 21:9 aspect ratio, overcast natural light, muted earth tones, damp autumn atmosphere, realistic muddy textures, shallow depth of field, and strong foreground shoulder framing. Set the scene on a rutted muddy country road running through a rural valley with rough wooden wattle fences on both sides, low rolling hills covered with sparse trees in the distance, open fields, and a small pale stone farmhouse or chapel on the far right hillside. The two characters face each other on the road. One is a weary medieval peasant man in a dirty brown tunic and cap, average build, carrying a wood-handled axe resting on his shoulder with a leather strap across his chest. The other is a knight or armed traveler in dark weathered chainmail and a worn hooded surcoat, standing still with a guarded posture. Create this as a grammar-of-cinema countershot demonstration: first frame shows the {argument name="foreground character" default="peasant man with axe"} from behind in the right foreground, his shoulder and back occupying the near right side of the frame, while the {argument name="background character" default="knight in chainmail"} stands full figure in the left midground facing camera on the muddy road; second frame reverses the angle and shows the knight’s shoulder and hooded back blurred in the left foreground while the peasant stands in the right midground holding the axe on his shoulder. Keep both shots consistent in location, weather, costume continuity, lens feel, and character spacing, with subdued dramatic realism and a tense conversational standoff.
title: Medieval Shot Reverse Shot
description: A cinematic two-angle medieval countershot scene for demonstrating over-the-shoulder framing and shot-reverse-shot composition.

content: A cinematic cyberpunk portrait of a futuristic street warrior standing in the center of a narrow neon-lit alley at night in a rain-soaked Asian megacity. Medium close-up framing from the chest up, subject facing forward, with the face partially obscured by a large centered rectangular censor block in muted teal-green. The character has messy glowing {argument name="hair color" default="bright cyan"} hair, a visible cybernetic right eye area with metallic facial implants, cables and mechanical details around the neck and jaw, and a rugged high-tech armored jacket with straps, buckles, tubes, segmented plating, and luminous cyan and orange light accents. Use a dramatic teal-and-orange color palette, glossy wet pavement reflections, soft rain in the air, dense atmospheric haze, and heavy bokeh from neon signage in the background. The alley should contain 8 visible glowing sign clusters, mostly vertical and horizontal signs with Chinese characters, plus futuristic storefront lights and industrial wall details. Make the mood gritty, stylish, dystopian, and ultra-detailed, with sharp focus on the subject and a blurred background, as if from a high-end sci-fi film still.

content: A cinematic, historically grounded depiction of {argument name="scene subject" default="Jesus with his disciples during the Last Supper"} inside a modest ancient Middle Eastern dining room at night, shown from a close, immersive viewpoint at table height as if the viewer is seated among them. Include exactly 13 men gathered tightly around a long narrow supper table, with the central figure reading clearly as Jesus through calm presence, shoulder-length dark brown hair, a beard, and a soft off-white robe with a light beige shawl. The 12 disciples should vary in age and appearance, with curly or wavy dark hair, beards, and earth-toned robes in cream, brown, tan, muted blue, and dusty gray, leaning inward in conversation and attention. The room should have rough plaster walls, dark exposed wooden ceiling beams, a heavy wooden door at the back, simple wall niches, and small oil lamps or candle sconces casting warm amber light. On the table, show rustic period-appropriate food and vessels: round flatbread, grapes, olives, shallow bowls, clay plates, ceramic cups, and copper or earthenware goblets, with one small candle near the center creating a focal glow. Composition should be wide and intimate, slightly crowded at the foreground edges, with several figures partially cropped to enhance realism and immersion. Lighting should be low, golden, and dramatic, with soft shadows, a reverent mood, realistic skin tones, natural fabric folds, and rich cinematic contrast. Render in a photorealistic style with ultra-detailed textures, subtle depth of field, and the emotional tone of a historical biblical film still.
title: Cinematic Last Supper Scene
description: This prompt generates a warm, photorealistic biblical dinner scene of Jesus and the 12 disciples, ideal for historical, devotional, or cinematic concept imagery.

content: Two powerful fantasy women standing back-to-back in the center of a vast cherry blossom field at dusk, full-body heroic composition, seen from a slightly low angle, ultra-detailed cinematic anime-realism. The woman on the left has {argument name="left character hair color" default="vivid crimson red"} short layered hair, a curvy athletic build, and a fierce dominant presence; she wears a black and dark red strappy battle outfit with a cropped leather top, high-cut bottoms, garter-like thigh straps, flowing translucent red ribbons, and long glossy black armguards. The woman on the right has {argument name="right character hair color" default="golden blonde with soft pink ends"} wavy shoulder-length hair, an athletic curvy build, and extensive floral tattoo sleeves and body tattoos across her arm, shoulder, ribs, and thigh; she wears a black and purple strappy fantasy outfit with sheer purple fabric panels, chain accents, and black gloves. Their bare upper backs press together as they face opposite directions with calm, intimidating confidence. There are exactly 2 massive glowing energy swords planted upright in the ground behind and beside them: 1 on the left radiating molten red-orange fire and ember-like cracks, and 1 on the right radiating electric violet and cyan energy with lightning coursing through the blade. The scene is set in a breathtaking sakura landscape with dense pink cherry trees, countless petals swirling violently through the air, a dramatic sunset sky filled with magenta, purple, and orange clouds, distant lightning, and a glowing horizon over a Japanese-inspired cityscape with a pagoda visible on the right. Emphasize raw power, sensual elegance, high contrast rim lighting, wind-blown fabric and hair, luminous particle effects, rich red-versus-purple color contrast, epic fantasy atmosphere, hyper-detailed rendering, sharp focus on the two women, and painterly cinematic depth.
title: Back-to-Back Sirens in Sakura Dusk
description: A cinematic fantasy artwork of two tattooed female warriors standing back-to-back in a cherry blossom field at sunset with two glowing energy swords, ideal for dramatic character art and poster-style hero imagery.

content: Create a colorful humorous comic-style poster in Spanish, vertical format, with a retro cartoon look, thick black outlines, warm orange and yellow palette, halftone texture, and exaggerated expressive characters. The layout has 4 distinct panels: 1 large title panel across the top and 3 equal vertical panels along the bottom row. In the top panel, show a smug orange tabby cat handyman standing upright like a person in a cozy living room workshop, holding a screwdriver in one paw and the other paw on the hip, wearing a utility belt with visible tools. The cat has narrowed confident eyes and a sly grin. On the left side of this top panel, place a large jagged comic burst with the Spanish headline in bold distressed lettering: "3 PASOS PARA ARRUINAR ALGO FÁCIL", with "ARRUINAR" in red and the rest in black. Below it, add a taped paper strip that says "edición casera". In the background of the top panel, include a framed sign on the wall that reads "YO PUEDO SOLO" with a small paw print, a small potted plant, shelves, and dynamic radial lines behind the cat. In the bottom row, create 3 labeled step panels, each with a yellow header box and bold black text. Panel 1 header: "PASO 1". Show the same orange cat sitting calmly on the floor beside a standing lamp, eyes closed with overconfidence, casually holding a screwdriver. Add a speech bubble that says "Tranqui, esto lo arreglo en 2 minutos." Include a small open toolbox and a few screws on the floor. Panel 2 header: "PASO 2". Show the cat mid-repair, now alarmed with wide eyes, awkwardly unscrewing the wrong part of the lamp while pieces and screws fly through the air. Add a speech bubble that says "Ups..." and a sticky note near the bottom that says "tocar lo que no era". Include visual motion lines, scattered debris, and a toppled plant pot. Panel 3 header: "PASO 3". Show the aftermath: the lamp is broken and smoking with exposed wires and sparks, the room is messy with shattered parts everywhere, and the cat sits stunned holding the screwdriver. A brown dog stands to the right, looking disappointed, asking in a speech bubble "¿Qué hiciste?" The cat replies in another speech bubble "No sé... se complicó solo." Add a taped label at the bottom that says "resultado final". Make the entire image playful, chaotic, and meme-like, with polished digital illustration, expressive faces, comic lettering, and a DIY disaster tone.
title: Funny DIY Disaster Cat Comic
description: A retro comic poster showing a smug orange cat ruining a simple home repair in three Spanish-labeled steps, ideal for memes, social posts, and humorous DIY content.

content: A cinematic, moody heist-planning scene in a dimly lit office at night, shot in a realistic thriller style. A single adult man stands with his back mostly to the camera, slightly turned in profile, writing on a huge whiteboard filled edge to edge with tactical notes, building sketches, floor plans, arrows, routes, and hand-drawn diagrams. He has wavy dark hair and wears a dark olive or charcoal casual jacket over dark trousers, giving the impression of a mastermind strategist. The whiteboard is the focal point and contains multiple readable planning areas: the top left title says "OPERATION NIGHTHAWK"; the left column has 3 sections labeled "OBJECTIVE," "TARGET," and "TIMELINE"; the upper right has 2 labeled diagram areas, "ENTRY PLAN" and "CAMERA NETWORK"; the lower middle-right has 4 labeled planning blocks, "TRANSIT," "EQUIPMENT," "HOTEL ROUTE," and "CONTINGENCIES." Include sketched building elevations, a rooftop access drawing, loading bay notes, room labels, arrows in black and red marker, and a small van sketch near the lower center. The room is warm and shadowy with amber practical lighting. On the left side of the frame, show a desk lamp glowing over a dark wooden desk with scattered papers, and a wall with 3 framed black-and-white photographs arranged vertically. Composition is a medium-wide over-the-shoulder shot, the man centered slightly left, the whiteboard dominating the background. High contrast, soft filmic grain, tense atmosphere, realistic textures, prestige TV crime-drama aesthetic similar to a brilliant planner preparing a robbery, but not depicting any specific copyrighted character. Add a white "Pollo.ai" watermark in the top-right corner.
title: Cinematic Heist Mastermind at Whiteboard
description: This prompt generates a moody crime-drama scene of a lone strategist mapping a robbery plan on a whiteboard, ideal for thriller posters, social media promos, or cinematic concept art.
