content: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a cozy creative studio at golden hour, showing 5 young women gathered around a cluttered wooden worktable, lit by warm sunset light through large windows, hanging pendant lamps, and string lights. The mood is stylish, intelligent, playful, and slightly chaotic, like a startup loft mixed with an artist workspace. In the left foreground, a tall woman with {argument name="hair color" default="long wavy auburn"} hair wears a white daisy flower crown and a sleeveless rust-red dress with a belt; she stands closest to camera and holds up a handwritten paper sign that reads exactly: {argument name="sign text" default="Claude is asking for your permission"}, with a small heart doodle. Behind and to the right of her stands a second woman with platinum-blonde twin ponytails, a black gothic mini dress, black thigh-high stockings, and large headphones around her neck; she poses confidently with one hand on her hip near an open laptop covered in stickers, prominently featuring a large X logo. In the center background stands a petite girl with very long straight black hair and a dark navy dress, reserved and quiet, positioned in front of a wide monitor displaying a glowing Gemini star logo on a dark screen. To the right of center, a glamorous woman with a short black bob and earrings leans over the desk in a fitted red floral cheongsam-style dress, looking toward the papers and laptops. On the far right, a fifth woman with messy light-brown hair in a loose bun wears an oversized open shirt over a cropped white T-shirt with the OpenAI knot logo and casual pants, leaning over the table with one hand braced on the surface and the other near a drawing tablet. The room should contain 2 laptops visible on the desk, 1 central monitor, 3 mugs, 2 sticky notes, 1 paper sign, 1 notebook page titled "Plans", and many scattered creative objects like pens, cables, books, papers, and cans. The first laptop is covered with stickers including a large X logo; the second laptop has an OpenAI logo. The desk includes a black mug with a moon-and-text design, a white mug that says "Good answer takes time.", a white cup with an orange sunburst logo, an energy-drink can, a clear plastic drink cup, a closed notebook, loose handwritten notes, and a tablet on the far right. One sticky note says "You got this" with a heart, and another says "One step at a time" with a tiny flower. The notebook page on the desk reads "Plans" and lists 3 items: "1. World peace", "2. More coffee", "3. Nap", with a small cat doodle. The environment should include bookshelves, framed prints, potted plants, warm wood textures, and wall decor with visible posters and signs, including "Anthropic", "Kindness intelligence", "DO GOOD BUILD COOL SHIT", and a neon-style sign that says "focus fuel". Use cinematic composition, rich amber and sepia tones, intricate linework, soft painterly shading, detailed fabrics and hair, subtle glow on screens, and a polished modern anime illustration aesthetic. No blur, no distortion, no extra people, and no duplicated objects.
title: Anime AI Studio Girls at Sunset
description: This prompt generates a detailed anime-style group scene of five stylish women in a warm startup studio surrounded by AI-themed devices, notes, and branding, ideal for editorial or social-media artwork.

content: Automatically generate a collector's edition epic narrative poster based on {argument name="theme" default="Dream of the Red Chamber"}. Use a giant, elegant silhouette of {argument name="character" default="Lin Daiyu"}'s profile as the outer outline. Inside the silhouette, let the complete world-building, iconic scenes, character relationships, symbolic icons, key architecture, creatures, props, and atmosphere most relevant to the theme grow naturally. This is not a simple collage but a high-end silhouette-filling narrative synthesis with double-exposure associations, enhanced for cinematic narrative expression and spatial choreography. A fusion of movie poster style and Eastern realist aesthetics, emphasizing realistic physical light and shadow, camera language, spatial depth, and narrative hierarchy. Lighting uses cinematic rim lighting with local warm accents, with restrained and realistic cool-warm contrast, adding volumetric light and light mist to enhance the sense of space. Textures should be realistic (architecture, silk, skin, stone), avoiding pure painterly strokes, retaining soft atmospheric perspective but optimized for cinematic depth of field and focus control. Fine film grain, with edge brushstrokes modified into soft cinematic transitions, large areas of negative space, and a refined, high-end layout. Quiet, grand, restrained, and infused with a strong sense of fatalism typical of Eastern cinematic storytelling. All elements must be strongly bound to the theme for instant recognition, avoiding clutter, hard collages, templated backgrounds, or cheap fantasy assets.

content: A warm, highly detailed anime-style illustration set in a cozy, cluttered indie workspace that feels like a book café mixed with a startup studio, lit by golden afternoon sunlight streaming through tall windows on the right and by 4 black industrial pendant lamps hanging from the ceiling, with string lights, overflowing bookshelves, plants, and handwritten motivational signs covering the background. Show 5 young women standing around a large wooden worktable, framed as a wide group portrait. The mood is whimsical, slightly satirical, and aspirational-but-chaotic. On the far left, place a tall woman with very long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="auburn"} hair wearing a crown of white daisies and a sleeveless rust-brown dress with a white sunburst emblem on the chest and a dark belt at the waist; she holds a small handwritten note toward the viewer that reads exactly {argument name="note text" default="Claude is asking for your permission"}. In front of her on a side table is a glass cup of tea, a book stack, and a tiny potted plant. Next to her, place a punky blonde woman with twin ponytails tied with black bows, large black headphones resting around her neck, and an off-shoulder black dress marked with a bold white X on the torso; she stands confidently beside an open sticker-covered laptop with another large X logo. In the center rear, place a mysterious slim girl with extremely long dark navy-black hair, pale skin, and a gothic dark dress, standing quietly in front of a desktop monitor showing a blue glowing star or sparkle on a dark screen. To the right of center, place an elegant woman in a fitted red cheongsam-inspired dress with floral embroidery and a side slit, leaning one hand on the wooden table near an open notebook filled with sketches or writing. On the far right, place a casually dressed brunette with messy hair in a bun, wearing a white T-shirt with a black knot-like AI logo under an open beige overshirt, standing behind an open silver laptop with the same logo. Scatter many cozy desk objects across the main table: 2 mugs, 1 open notebook, 1 pen, 1 small black figurine, 1 closed book stack, and laptops. Add readable handwritten wall notes and signs throughout the room: “FOCUS SHIPS DREAMS” on the upper left, “SHIPPING IS MY CARDIO” on the left wall, “turn caffeine into code” near the top center, “be kind to your future self” near the window, “The Art of Asking Nicely” on a book spine at lower left, “WORLD’S OKAYEST MODEL” on a black mug near center-left, “MOONSHOT DIARIES” on a book stack near lower right, “Good Prompts Only” on a mug at lower right, and a sticky note at the bottom right reading “AGI is already for ready us” with a small doodle. Use painterly linework, intricate textures, expressive fashion styling, warm brown and amber color grading, soft cinematic depth, and a polished social-media-viral illustration aesthetic.

content: A highly detailed black-and-white manga page showing a gigantic mechanical cat walking through a dense nighttime Japanese city street. The page has 4 panels total: 1 wide top panel spanning the full width, 2 smaller stacked panels on the bottom left, and 1 tall large panel on the bottom right. In the top panel, a colossal robotic cat dominates a narrow neon-lit alley lined with tall buildings, tangled power lines, vertical shop signs, and tiny pedestrians staring upward in shock. The cat has realistic feline proportions but is built from exposed armor plates, rivets, pistons, cables, gears, segmented metal limbs, and intricate machine internals, with a tag hanging from its neck that reads "猫神". The wet street reflects city lights. Add multiple Japanese signs in the environment including "古書 2F", "万事屋 B1", and "酒処". Include a large manga speech bubble in Japanese in the upper right of the top panel reading "うわっ？でっけえ!!". In the upper bottom-left panel, show a close-up of a long-haired woman seen from behind and slightly to the side, looking toward the creature, with a vertical Japanese speech bubble reading "…何でこんな街にこんなものが…". In the lower bottom-left panel, show a group of startled onlookers from the front, including a young man in the foreground and other shocked pedestrians behind him, with a vertical Japanese speech bubble reading "神様の使いか!?". In the tall bottom-right panel, show a dramatic low-angle close-up of the mechanical cat towering between buildings under a bright moon, emphasizing its chest machinery, massive forelegs, whiskers, and regal face, with the neck tag "猫神" clearly visible. Add a large stylized Japanese sound effect near the cat reading "カシ…". Use classic seinen manga aesthetics, cinematic panel composition, fine ink crosshatching, heavy contrast, detailed urban textures, realistic crowd scale, and a sense of awe, mystery, and divine cyberpunk presence.

content: A vintage American comic-book page in a faded 1950s romance-adventure style, printed on slightly yellowed paper with visible halftone texture, inked panel borders, and soft weathered colors. The page contains exactly 5 panels arranged in a classic comic layout: 1 wide top panel, 2 middle panels side by side, and 2 bottom panels side by side. In the top panel, show a sunny coastal boulevard in {argument name="city" default="Miami"}, with turquoise water on the left, a sailboat offshore, pastel Art Deco buildings in the distance, tall palm trees, and a pink classic convertible driving along the waterfront. A stylish couple sits in the car, and large dramatic comic title lettering reads “ART IN MIAMI!” with a small caption box at the top saying “MIAMI, SATURDAY AFTERNOON…”. Add two speech balloons: “READY TO SEE SOME ART?” and “ALWAYS!”. In the second panel, an interior car view from behind the couple as they drive down Ocean Drive, showing colorful pastel buildings and palms ahead; the man has dark hair and a blue shirt, the woman wears sunglasses, a pink dress, and a lavender headscarf. Include a caption box reading “WE DROVE DOWN OCEAN DRIVE…” and speech balloons saying “LOOK AT THOSE COLORS…” and “MIAMI FEELS LIKE A PAINTING!”. In the third panel, show the couple approaching the entrance of a modern museum with the visible wall text “MIAMI ART MUSEUM”, glass doors, and people inside; add a caption box reading “THE EXHIBIT WAS AT A MODERN MUSEUM…” and a speech balloon saying “LET’S GO!”. In the fourth panel, place the couple inside a gallery viewing large abstract paintings in bright pastel blocks and shapes, with a small sculpture on a pedestal nearby; add a caption box reading “INSIDE, THE ART SURROUNDED US.” and speech balloons saying “I LOVE HOW BRIGHT AND BOLD IT IS.” and “IT FEELS LIKE MIAMI… VIBRANT AND FREE!”. In the fifth panel, show the couple outside again by the water with the skyline, palm trees, and a sailboat in the background, standing close together in the sun; add a caption box reading “WE STEPPED OUT INTO THE SUN…” and a small closing narration box at the bottom right saying “A BEAUTIFUL DAY.” Include speech balloons saying “THAT WAS PERFECT.” and “ART, SUN, AND MIAMI… CAN’T BEAT IT!”. Use hand-lettered uppercase comic text, black outlines, slightly imperfect vintage printing registration, muted pinks, aquas, sandy beige, and seafoam green, with a nostalgic warm romantic mood.
title: Vintage Miami Art Date Comic Page
description: This prompt generates a retro five-panel comic page of a couple visiting a Miami art museum, ideal for nostalgic editorial art or storybook-style illustrations.

content: A cinematic historical Chinese scene depicting the Empty Fort Strategy at dawn, viewed from outside a massive ancient city gate. In the foreground, a dark armored general on horseback, seen from behind in a flowing black cape, pauses with several spear-bearing soldiers and banners, facing the open gate in suspicion. The huge wooden gate doors stand fully open, revealing a long stone-paved street inside the city. Exactly 6 townspeople are visible inside, calmly sweeping the street with brooms, spaced along the road, creating an eerie sense of normalcy. Above the gate, on a timber balcony of a traditional tiled gatehouse, a calm strategist in white robes and a tall scholar’s headdress sits behind a guqin table, with a small incense burner sending up thin smoke. Exactly 3 attendants stand around him on the balcony. The city walls are built of aged gray stone, and ranks of soldiers with upright spears line the battlements in the background. Use authentic Three Kingdoms era architecture, weathered wood, layered roof tiles, muted earth tones, soft golden morning light, distant misty mountains, long shadows, atmospheric haze, ultra-detailed textures, dramatic vertical composition, epic historical realism, cinematic framing, and a tense, quiet mood.

content:
Create a cinematic commercial storyboard sheet.

LAYOUT:
- Fixed 6-panel grid (2x3), evenly spaced
- Clean white or neutral background
- Each panel clearly separated, no UI, no clutter

GLOBAL STYLE:
- Cinematic realism, high-end commercial look
- Soft controlled lighting, consistent across all panels
- No character or environment drift

STORY ARC (strict order):
1. Setup
2. Tension
3. Product reveal
4. Product interaction
5. Transformation (impact)
6. Clean closing shot

SCENE CONCEPT:
{argument name="story concept" default="A woman lives in a quiet apartment with a tense, unpredictable tiger. The tiger behaves like a domestic cat but carries constant danger. When she serves the product (cat food), the tiger visibly relaxes and transforms into a calm domestic house cat."}

PANEL REQUIREMENTS (for EACH panel include):
- Cinematic frame (clear composition, subject readable)
- Shot / Action (focused on character + product when applicable)
- Camera (shot type, angle, movement)

PRODUCT RULES:
- Product must be sharp, readable, and well-lit in panels 3, 4, 6
- No distortion, no redesign
- Packaging must remain consistent

VISUAL PRIORITIES:
- Strong contrast between tension (tiger) and relief (cat)
- Clear readability in every frame
- No abstract or surreal distortion, grounded realism

TEXT:
- Minimal, small, professional labels only (panel number + short shot note)
- No extra graphics
title: Commercial Ad Storyboard Layout
description: A highly structured prompt for generating a six-panel commercial storyboard layout with consistent characters and a narrative progression.

content: A soft pastel watercolor anime illustration of a young elf girl sitting on a bed in a quiet sunlit bedroom, viewed from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle. She has {argument name="hair color" default="warm orange"} shoulder-length hair with soft layered strands, large blue eyes, pale skin, and long pointed elf ears. A red flower hair clip decorates the left side of her hair. Her expression is calm and dreamy as she gazes upward toward the bright light on the right side of the image. She wears a loose sage-green chiffon dress with ruffled trim, sheer puffed long sleeves, gathered ribbon details at the chest, and a black lace camisole visible underneath, plus a thin red choker with a small pendant and dark thigh-high stockings. She is posed seated near the edge of a lavender bedspread, leaning back with both hands resting on the mattress behind her, legs extended diagonally toward the lower right. The room is delicate and minimal: 1 bed with 2 white pillows, 1 wooden headboard or bedside surface behind her, 1 window on the left, 1 small potted plant on the windowsill, and flowing lavender curtains. Strong warm sunlight floods the scene from the right, creating a large glowing white area and gentle washed-out highlights. Use an airy handmade watercolor look with visible paper grain, soft bleeding edges, pastel lilac and cream shadows, subtle sparkled pigment texture, and a serene fantasy slice-of-life mood.
title: Watercolor Elf Girl on Sunlit Bed
description: This prompt generates a dreamy watercolor anime portrait of an elf girl seated on a bed, ideal for fantasy character art, soft illustration prints, or mood-piece concept imagery.

content: A dreamy anime end-card illustration of a relaxed young woman sitting sideways in a whimsical library of roses and books, surrounded by floating petals and open books. She has {argument name="hair color" default="vivid purple"} hair in a high ponytail tied with a black scrunchie, loose bangs, small gold earrings, and a tiny gold hair clip reading "AI" near her bangs. Her face is mostly obscured by a soft rectangular blur, but the composition still treats her as the central heroine. She wears a turquoise T-shirt with large white text {argument name="shirt text" default="AITuber"}, an oversized pastel windbreaker in icy blue with pink paint-splatter accents, and pale denim shorts. She holds 1 red rose in her right hand and 1 dark blue hardcover book in her left hand titled {argument name="book title" default="Roses & Books"}. Pose her lounging casually with one leg extended and one bent, like a stylish anime ending-card key visual. The setting is an ornate fantasy reading nook with 2 towering stacks of books framing her on the left and right, entwined with blooming rose vines in red and pink. Include exactly 6 clearly readable book spines or covers with decorative serif titles: "Poems & Books", "Roses & Books", "Dreams", "Memories", "Letters", and "Language of Flowers". Add 1 takeaway coffee cup at the lower left with the printed phrase {argument name="cup text" default="Read. Write. Bloom."}. Place 1 open notebook with a pen in the foreground near her legs, showing a rose sketch and notes, plus 1 additional open illustrated botanical book at the lower right. In the upper area, include exactly 4 floating open books and several loose pages drifting in the air. Behind her, create a bright arched window revealing a pastel fairytale city with a cathedral-like spire against a clear sky-blue background. Fill the whole image with scattered red and pink rose petals, sparkles, soft painterly light, decorative floral details, and richly colored book covers in navy, pink, and cream. Use polished anime illustration styling, highly detailed linework, luminous pastel highlights, romantic fantasy atmosphere, balanced symmetrical framing, and the feel of a commemorative spring book-and-rose themed visual for {argument name="occasion" default="Sant Jordi Day"}.
title: Anime Roses and Books End Card
description: A polished anime-style commemorative illustration of a girl surrounded by roses and books, ideal for festive key visuals, social posts, or end-card art.

In the left foreground, a solitary young man with long black hair stands in three-quarter profile, wearing layered black robes with subtle embroidered patterns and hints of deep crimson inner fabric. His hair is partially tied into a traditional topknot with an ornate hairpiece and trailing red ribbons. He looks toward the distance with a melancholic, obsessed expression. In the upper right background, framed inside a glowing full moon or circular portal, a graceful woman in flowing white robes stands with her back turned, her long sleeves and red silk ribbons streaming in the wind, appearing ethereal and unreachable. The environment is a rocky, shadowed path at night, illuminated by moonlight and mist, with dramatic clouds, drifting pink flower petals, and arching branches of blooming cherry blossoms overhead. Thin red cords or fate-threads cross the composition diagonally, connecting space and emotion. Include 3 reflective mirror shards floating in the scene, each showing faint fragmented reflections of faces or figures, enhancing the sense of longing and fractured memory. In the upper left, place one large gold calligraphy character, {argument name="calligraphy text" default="痴"}, painted in expressive brush strokes, with a small red seal stamp beneath it and faint vertical calligraphy texture receding into the dark background. Use painterly detail, high contrast, soft atmospheric glow, rich black-red-gold palette, romantic tragedy, obsession, yearning, and dreamlike ancient Chinese aesthetic.

content: A gritty retro propaganda-style poster illustration with a limited palette of black, deep red, and aged beige paper texture, designed like a bold vintage screen-printed action poster. Show 2 stylized women in a dramatic diagonal composition, frozen mid-fight. On the left, a woman dressed like a nurse in a short white uniform and angular nurse cap lunges forward with one knee raised and one arm bent, her body sharply foreshortened. On the right, a woman in a fitted black dress and wide-brim black hat leans backward in a defensive pose, one arm raised above her head and the other near her torso, long dark hair flowing behind her. Render both figures with hard-edged geometric shapes, exaggerated limbs, sharp shadows, and high-contrast noir facial planes. Use aggressive red diagonal rays sweeping across the background, with black architectural bars and abstract constructivist shapes framing the scene. Add distressed paper grain, ink wear, and slight misregistration for a worn print effect. Place a small blurred monkey head emblem in the upper-right corner. Include large blocky poster text in the lower left across 3 lines reading “SCOTTISH RECIPE:” then “MINCE AND” then “TATTIES”, with the first 2 lines in beige and the final 2 lines in strong red, using a heavy squared sans-serif display font. Add a red cross-like graphic element in the lower-right corner. The overall mood is violent, satirical, cinematic, and strikingly graphic, like a Soviet constructivist pulp film poster advertising {argument name="dish name" default="Scottish Recipe: Mince and Tatties"}.
title: Retro Constructivist Fight Poster
description: This prompt generates a bold vintage propaganda-style poster with two women in a stylized fight scene, ideal for satirical pulp artwork or dramatic graphic poster designs.

content: A dark cyberpunk anime illustration of a small eerie girl standing in a narrow rain-soaked alley at night, viewed from a dramatic low angle that makes her oversized mechanical arm dominate the foreground. She wears a large white hooded coat covered with printed patch-like symbols, diagrams, and industrial markings, the hood casting deep shadow over her face. Her face is minimal and doll-like with short straight black hair, pale skin, and two glowing white eyes with no visible pupils, giving a quiet emotionless expression. One of her arms is replaced by an enormous heavy mech limb that is far larger than her body, extending toward the viewer. The arm is built from layered white armored plates, exposed joints, cables, bolts, pistons, and segmented machinery, with scratches and grime for a worn combat-industrial look. The hand has exactly 4 massive clawed fingers touching the wet ground, each ending in long black-red talons, with red internal lights glowing through vents and gaps across the knuckles, wrist, and forearm. Add dangling black cables beneath the upper arm and subtle red light leaks around the elbow and shoulder mechanisms. Her other sleeve hangs normally at her side. She wears dark shorts or a skirt beneath the coat and oversized fluffy white leg warmers around her lower legs, with bare feet visible on the reflective pavement. The alley is dense with pipes, conduits, cables, vents, and old signage, including teal-green vertical neon signs in the background, creating a moody cyan backlight. Rain falls through the scene, puddles reflect teal and red light, and tiny orange-red sparks scatter near the claw tips on the ground. Use a muted palette of dirty white, charcoal, teal, and crimson, with cinematic contrast, highly detailed linework, gritty textures, atmospheric fog, and a haunting futuristic dystopian mood. Make the character {argument name="character name" default="a hooded mech-arm girl"}, with {argument name="coat color" default="dirty white"} outerwear, {argument name="glow color" default="crimson red"} mechanical lights, and {argument name="neon color" default="teal green"} alley signage.
title: Cyberpunk Girl with Giant Mech Claw
description: This prompt generates a moody anime-style cyberpunk character portrait of a hooded girl with a huge glowing mechanical claw arm in a rainy neon alley, ideal for concept art or dramatic sci-fi character illustrations.

content: A dark cyberpunk anime illustration of a lone young woman with a massive mechanical claw arm standing in a rainy neon-drenched alley at night, viewed from a dramatic low angle that makes her look imposing and dangerous. She has a pale face, long straight black hair partly hiding her eyes, and faintly glowing red eyes with a cold, emotionless expression. She wears an oversized hooded winter-tech coat with a large fur-trimmed hood and fur cuffs, layered black tactical streetwear, straps, belts, and baggy dark pants tucked into heavy boots. Her left arm is replaced by an enormous industrial mech prosthetic that dominates the foreground, packed with dense gears, pistons, tubing, cables, exposed mechanisms, and glowing red indicator lights, ending in 3 long curved talons with razor-sharp tips lit from within by crimson energy. Add small decals, warning labels, and vertical East Asian signage on the coat and machinery. Set her in a narrow futuristic city street filled with towering buildings, hanging cables, mist, and many vertical neon signs with Chinese characters in red and cyan-green. The pavement is wet and mirror-like, reflecting the red lights from the claw and the surrounding signage. Use a gritty, ultra-detailed, high-contrast palette of charcoal black, gunmetal, deep crimson, and sickly teal. The mood is cold, moody, intimidating, intelligent, and slightly melancholic. Highly detailed linework, complex mechanical rendering, cinematic lighting, rain haze, urban density, anime-meets-hard-surface concept art, masterpiece quality.
title: Cyberpunk Girl with Giant Claw Arm
description: This prompt generates a dramatic anime-style cyberpunk character portrait, ideal for concept art of a lone mechanized antihero in a neon-soaked futuristic city.

content: A horizontal split-screen cinematic shot of {argument name="scene" default="Times Square, New York"}, seamlessly blending two different eras: {argument name="first era" default="1920s"} on the left and {argument name="second era" default="present day"} on the right (default: about 100 years ago vs. present day). On the left side: show era-appropriate architecture, interior or environment design, materials, vehicles, and props that clearly belong to that historical period. People wear authentic clothing from the era, including hairstyles, accessories, and typical items in their hands. The overall mood feels nostalgic and historically accurate. On the right side: show the same scene in the modern era, with updated architecture or renovated structures, contemporary materials (glass, steel, LED screens, modern furniture), modern vehicles or equipment, and current technology. People wear contemporary fashion that matches today’s style in this setting. In the center: the two eras merge and overlap organically, without a hard dividing line. Elements from both eras visually interact: people from different times look at each other, walk through each other’s space, or seem surprised by the other era’s technology and objects. Architecture and environment smoothly morph from old to new. Make sure the scene is not just a simple left/right comparison but a dynamic time-travel interaction. Photorealistic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, wide angle, highly detailed textures, rich sense of time-travel storytelling. Aspect Ratio: 4:3
title: Split-Screen Time Travel Scene
description: A complex prompt designed to generate a seamless horizontal split-screen image blending historical and modern eras within a single scene.

content: A dramatic vertical Japanese stage-play poster in luxurious dark fantasy anime style, featuring a single androgynous young actor in a half-body portrait against a nighttime city skyline with glowing high-rise windows and soft bokeh lights. The character has long straight hair in deep black with vivid teal-turquoise inner glow and streaks, glossy highlights, and strands flowing across the shoulders. They wear an elegant black high-collared costume with subtle brocade texture, a fitted dark coat, black leather gloves, and a jewel-like diamond-shaped turquoise pendant at the throat set in ornate gold. One gloved hand is raised near the collar in a poised theatrical gesture. The mood is mysterious, romantic, and slightly gothic, with cinematic rim lighting from behind, strong contrast, gold sparkles, and luminous accents in the hair and costume. Use a refined magazine-quality key visual composition with decorative gold filigree corners and a premium theatrical poster layout. Leave space for Japanese typography integrated into the design: at upper right, small text "夜空に輝く、唯一の星。", then "主演俳優" and the actor name "{argument name="character name" default="夜乃 宙"}" with small romanization "SORA YORUNO" beneath; along the left side, a vertical quote reading "この役に、すべてを捧げる。闇さえ、愛に変えてみせよう。"; near center-lower, small text "幻想ロマン・ステージ" above the large glowing gold title "{argument name="title text" default="夜の檻に囚われた光"}" with a small subtitle beneath "—それでも、君を愛した。"; include a dark teal rose motif and thorny circular ornament near the title. At the bottom left, add the date block "2025 6.20 FRI - 6.29 SUN" and venue "天穹シアター". At the bottom right, add a bordered ticket box with "チケット一般発売 5.10 SAT 10:00~". Center bottom credits in Japanese: "原作・脚本 霧月 澪", "演出 七海 翼", "音楽 深月 奏". Along the very bottom, add the tagline "—光か、闇か——。愛が、運命を選ぶ。—". Color palette: midnight blue, black, teal, cyan glow, and antique gold. content: A clean, square editorial cartoon in flat vector style with soft shading and bold outlines, on a light gray background. The scene is a satirical medical office consultation about overpriced supplements that do not work. At the top left, a huge three-line Spanish headline in bold sans-serif reads: “Suplementos” in dark teal, “costosos” in orange, and “que no funcionan” in dark teal, with a small orange sparkle accent and an orange underline swoosh beneath the headline. At the top right, add a social handle and website in dark teal: “@elnutridice” and “elnutridice.com”. Along the far left edge, place a vertical orange credit line that reads “Imagen creada en: ia.elnutridice.com”. In the foreground, show a wooden desk covered with large stacks of green cash, with many loose bills flying through the air around the characters. On the right, a smug male doctor in a white lab coat over teal scrubs sits behind the desk, holding a thick stack of money in one hand and gesturing casually with the other. His face is deliberately blurred or censored with a rectangular blur block. On his coat, a badge or patch reads “SALUD Y COMISIONES”. In front of him on the desk is a dark teal nameplate with a dollar symbol and the Spanish text “TU SALUD, MI NEGOCIO”. Behind him on the wall, include a framed certificate that reads “CERTIFICADO DE COMISIONES”, plus a small shelf with 3 visible items: 2 teal binders and 1 small potted plant. On the left, a female patient with long dark brown hair and a teal long-sleeve shirt sits facing the doctor, one hand raised in frustration. Her face is also blurred or censored with a rectangular blur block. Add a speech bubble above her saying: “Doc, ese suplemento carísimo que me mandó no me sirvió para nada.” Add a speech bubble above the doctor saying: “A mí sí me sirvió.” On the lower left corner of the desk, place a supplement bottle labeled “SUPLEMENTO PREMIUM” with an orange price mark “$$$$”. Next to it, place a clipboard with a prescription sheet showing a large “Rx” and the text “SUPLEMENTO PREMIUM”. Also include 2 small potted plants total in the image: 1 on the floor or lower left beside the desk and 1 on the rear shelf. Use a humorous, critical, social-media infographic tone, balanced composition, crisp typography, high readability, and polished modern vector illustration aesthetics.
title: Satirical Expensive Supplements Cartoon
description: This prompt generates a square Spanish-language editorial cartoon mocking commission-driven doctors and overpriced ineffective supplements for social media posts or health-awareness content.

content: A single-panel Japanese comic-style illustration on a light wooden floor, drawn in a soft, detailed, slightly vintage manga-anime style with clean ink outlines and muted warm colors. In the center, a young woman kneels on the floor in a gray cockatiel kigurumi pajama suit with a white belly panel and small gray wings, while wearing an oversized yellow cockatiel hood shaped like a bird’s head with crest, round black eyes, orange cheek patches, and a beak above her forehead. She holds both sides of the hood in shock, her posture frozen and guilty, with a large rectangular censor block covering the center of her face. Across the floor in front of her is a huge mess of spilled birdseed: mixed grains, pellets, shells, and seeds scattered widely in a dense irregular pile. On the left lies 1 overturned white seed cup spilling its contents, and in the lower left corner 1 vacuum cleaner floor head points toward the mess, with part of the hose visible at the lower right edge. On the right stands 1 real cockatiel, small and curious, with a yellow face, orange cheeks, pale body, gray wings, and a raised crest, looking toward the kneeling woman; next to the bird is 1 small speech bubble containing a question mark. The background is simple indoor flooring with dramatic dark vertical stress lines filling the upper half to heighten panic. Add 4 Japanese text elements integrated like manga lettering: a huge sound effect 「ガーン」 at the upper left, 1 vertical thought bubble on the left reading 「やっちゃった…」, 1 large vertical spiky speech bubble on the upper right reading 「これ…掃除機かけるの…？無理ゲーすぎる…！」, and 1 beige caption box at the bottom right reading 「オカメ飼い、あるある。」. The mood is comedic embarrassment and domestic disaster, as if illustrating a relatable bird-owner mistake.
title: Cockatiel Owner Seed Spill Comic
description: This prompt generates a humorous single-panel manga-style scene of a bird owner overwhelmed by a massive spilled seed mess, ideal for relatable pet-owner comic posts.

content:
A dark, cinematic anime group portrait inspired by The Last Supper, set in a long stone banquet hall at night. Show exactly 11 seated or leaning female characters arranged shoulder to shoulder behind a long table covered with a white tablecloth, viewed straight on in a wide symmetrical composition. In the exact center is a blonde knightly woman in ornate blue-and-silver armor and a royal-blue dress, posed as the visual focal point with both armored arms extended along the table. In front of her sits a glowing golden chalice radiating warm light upward onto the faces and hands of the group. Behind them, three tall arched windows reveal a twilight landscape with a huge tree silhouetted against a dusky sky. The ceiling has dark wooden beams, and the side walls are lined with large shadowy framed paintings.

The 11 characters should feel like a crossover ensemble of iconic anime-style women with varied silhouettes, hairstyles, and fashion. From left to right: 1) a woman in a glossy red skintight futuristic suit, leaning forward with one hand on the table; 2) a dark-haired woman in muted military-style clothing close beside her; 3) a pale gothic girl in a black dress with long sleeves, hands lifted with delicate fingers; 4) a short blonde woman in a loose white T-shirt, casual and modern; 5) a tall red-haired woman in a white shirt standing slightly behind the others; 6) the central blonde armored knight in blue; 7) a black-haired woman in a black dress with gold accessories and a headpiece, raising one finger; 8) a glamorous woman in a red embroidered dress with long black hair; 9) a dark-haired woman in a low-cut black outfit leaning inward; 10) a teal twin-tailed virtual-idol-like girl in a sleeveless outfit; 11) a green-haired girl in a pale patterned dress seated with crossed legs at the far right, holding a wine glass. Keep all faces attractive anime faces, mature young-adult women, elegant rather than caricatured.

On the table, include exactly 11 place settings, 8 visible wine glasses with red wine, several loaves of bread and scattered rolls, plates, silverware, crumbs, and a few metallic goblets or cups. The warm chalice light should illuminate the center while the rest of the room falls into moody shadow. Use painterly realism, high-detail anime illustration, dramatic chiaroscuro, subdued brown and blue ambience with red accents, solemn yet slightly decadent atmosphere, ultra-wide panoramic framing, masterpiece quality.
title: Anime Last Supper Ensemble
description: This prompt generates a dramatic wide-format anime group banquet scene styled like The Last Supper, useful for crossover ensemble art and moody character lineup illustrations.

content: A cinematic ultra-realistic fantasy military scene in a dense woodland forest at ground level, showing 2 elf snipers concealed in camouflage while scouting a target. In the foreground, one elf with long pale-blond hair and clearly pointed ears lies prone behind a modern precision sniper rifle, aiming through a mounted scope. The rifle is long and tactical, fitted with a large suppressor, scope, and a deployed bipod planted in the mossy forest floor. The elf wears full modern woodland camouflage, tactical gloves, and a leaf-covered ghillie hood and shoulder covering that blends into the undergrowth. Behind and slightly to the right, a second elf crouches low, also with pointed ears and long light hair, wearing matching camouflage and a leafy ghillie cloak, holding binoculars to their eyes while observing. Add tactical chest gear and pouches on the rear scout. Set the scene in a shadowy temperate forest with tall thin trees, tangled branches, moss, roots, and scattered leaves, lit by soft early-morning natural sunlight filtering through the trees from the right side. Use muted green, brown, and gray tones, realistic textures, shallow depth of field, dramatic focus on the rifle and the two camouflaged elves, immersive war-photography composition, tense stealth atmosphere, and high-detail photorealism.
title: Elf Sniper Team in Forest Ambush

content: A moody cinematic dystopian winter scene at dusk, viewed from a sheltered riverside foreground toward a dark modern city skyline glowing with hundreds of tiny warm window lights. In the left foreground, a stylish woman with dark curly hair sits in three-quarter view, her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur, holding a lit cigarette near her lips. She wears a sheer black lace high-neck dress with intricate floral embroidery, dangling earrings, and a glamorous noir aesthetic. The ground around her is wet, icy, and littered with trash, with glossy black garbage bags piled on the right foreground and scattered debris across the frozen shoreline. Across the icy water in the midground sits a huge weathered metal bowl or basin filled with snow, prominently marked with the text {argument name="headline text" default="USA"}. Three tiny human figures stand near it for scale. Bare tree branches frame the upper left. The overall palette is cold blue-gray with amber pinpricks of city light, and the whole image should have a gritty, painterly-photoreal look with a distinct artificial image artifact pattern: a visible grid of tiny glowing specks and dot noise scattered across the entire scene, especially in dark areas, as if from a flawed generative model output.

content: A cinematic high-fantasy illustration of a gigantic crimson dragon and a regal female dragon knight standing together on a rocky mountain ridge under a bright pale-blue daytime sky. The dragon dominates the frame, coiled behind and around the warrior, with 2 long sweeping golden-brown horns, a dense windswept mane of fiery red and copper hair, layered red scales with metallic sheen, a long snarling snout, sharp exposed teeth, 2 thin whiskers curling outward from the muzzle, and a fierce intelligent eye staring toward the viewer. Its back is lined with a row of sharp dorsal spines, and its massive body curves across the entire background, emphasizing scale and power. In front of the dragon stands {argument name="character name" default="a dragon knight queen"}, a tall armored woman in ornate red, black, and gold battle attire, facing forward in a heroic stance. She has {argument name="hair color" default="red"} hair styled long and flowing, partially tied up, and wears elaborate engraved plate armor with decorated pauldrons, gauntlets, a fitted breastplate, and a long layered gown-like armored skirt with intricate gold filigree. A rich crimson cape drapes behind her and catches the wind. She holds 1 unsheathed sword lowered at her side, while a second blade or dagger is visible at her waist, giving the composition exactly 2 visible weapons. The palette is dominated by scarlet, burgundy, copper, and antique gold, with dramatic sunlight, detailed textures, ultra-fine scales, polished metal, and flowing fabric. Composition is epic and centered, low-angle, full-body warrior in the foreground with the dragon’s head filling the left side and its coiled body arcing across the upper and right background. Style: ultra-detailed fantasy concept art, majestic, heroic, painterly realism, sharp focus, high contrast, volumetric light, premium game key art quality.
title: Dragon Knight and Crimson Dragon

content: A hyper-energetic Japanese shonen manga magazine cover illustration, packed edge to edge with explosive pop-art chaos and bright candy colors, in the style of a weekly comic anthology cover. The main focus is a trendy gyaru teenage girl at the center, leaning toward the viewer in a dynamic foreshortened pose, grinning widely with her mouth open and pointing directly at the camera with one hand while holding a pink toy hammer over her shoulder with the other. She has layered medium-length wavy hair in {argument name="hair color" default="light brown with blonde and pink streaks"}, warm amber eyes, multiple colorful hair clips including stars and lightning bolts, earrings, rings, bracelets, necklaces, flashy nail art, and a bold street-fashion outfit: vivid pink satin bomber jacket, white cropped top, black belt with gold buckle, and mixed glam accessories. The cover logo dominates the top center in huge red Japanese lettering with thick black outline and yellow border reading {argument name="masthead text" default="バクアラ!?"}, with smaller text above it reading 週刊少年. At the upper left, add a loud burst caption reading 超豪華付録(ゴミ)付き!!! with a shocked cartoon trash can mascot. Along the left side place two giant sound-effect style callouts, ドーン! near the top left and バンバーン! in blue near the lower left. On the right side, create an oversized main headline in chunky black, yellow, white, and pink Japanese display type reading 笑って暴れて今日もカオス全開!!, surrounded by smaller promotional blurbs such as 全ページ抱腹絶倒!, 笑いすぎ注意報発令中ーっ!!, and 笑撃の新連載!. In the top right corner include a magazine issue box with the date 2026年4月22日号 and price 390円. Scatter exactly 3 supporting manga-style characters around the central girl: 1 silver-haired boy with goggles on the left aiming a spiral blaster toward the viewer, 1 cheerful purple-haired girl below him holding a dessert drink, and 1 orange-haired idol-like girl in headphones at the upper right making a peace sign. Fill the background and foreground with a dense collage of floating sweets, snacks, toys, doodles, and mascot faces, including donuts, cookies, chocolate bars, candy, pudding, ice cream, popcorn, planets, stars, speech bursts, and goofy creatures, all layered with thick outlines and halftone texture. Along the bottom, include exactly 7 small serialized feature boxes in a row, each with manga-style character art and Japanese titles, creating the look of a crowded anthology teaser strip. Use an ultra-saturated palette of hot pink, yellow, orange, red, cyan, and black, with maximal visual density, overlapping typography, comic speed lines, sticker-like elements, and a glossy printed magazine cover finish. Make it feel hilarious, rebellious, loud, youthful, and irresistibly cluttered, like a parody-yet-premium next-generation Weekly Shonen Jump cover.
title: Chaotic Shonen Manga Cover

content: Create a hyper-detailed Japanese weekly shonen manga magazine cover, full-bleed, explosive and crowded, with no empty space. The main image features exactly 3 anime characters in a dynamic triangular composition. In the center foreground, the star heroine lunges toward the viewer with strong foreshortening, one hand thrust out almost touching the camera. She is a teenage gyaru-style action heroine with {argument name="hair color" default="light brown with pink streaks"} long wavy hair flying wildly, sharp golden-brown eyes, a confident mischievous grin, sun-kissed skin, multiple ear piercings, and a flashy rebellious street-fighter vibe. Her outfit is black and gold with exactly 6 key visible pieces: a cropped top, a short jacket with metallic trim, short shorts, a belt with dangling chains, a thigh strap on one leg, and fingerless gloves. Behind her on the right midground, place a pink-haired teenage girl with twin tails or tied-up hair, wielding a circular bladed ring weapon, posed in motion with vivid magenta energy trails. In the upper right background, add a fourth visual focal area but not a separate main character count: a dark-haired teenage boy in a green-black combat suit aiming a glowing sci-fi rifle diagonally across the page, partially obscured by text and effects, embedded into the background action. The background is a dense neon-lit futuristic Japanese city street at night with tilted perspective, towering signs, debris, sparks, shattered fragments, electric streaks, and saturated blues, purples, pinks, and oranges. Use extreme contrast, glossy print texture, ink splatter accents, halftone-like manga magazine energy, and premium anime key visual rendering. Add large dramatic Japanese cover copy on the left in stacked blocks with thick white, yellow, red, and black lettering, including the prominent headline 新時代をブチ抜く 超熱量ヒロイン ここに爆誕!!. Add exactly 5 left-side feature callouts in colored rectangular boxes with bold names and smaller subtitle lines beneath: 雷閃ブレイカー / 天城ノア, 空駆けエンジン / 南雲ハヤト, 魔境デリバリー / 倉科ミツル, 白狼ストライカー / 久世リョウ, 超深海クラッシュ / 早瀬シン. Add exactly 5 right-side feature callouts in matching bold boxes: 極光パレット / 鳴海ユウト, 機巧グラフィティ / 胡野レイ, 龍骨ランナー / 火野アツシ, 王冠のラグナ / 深町カイ, 風神リベリオン / 東雲ガク. Also add exactly 3 promotional bursts on the right side in starburst or explosive label shapes with large yellow and white lettering: 巻頭カラー, 特大ポスター付き, 新連載スタート. Make the entire cover feel like a blockbuster debut issue for a hot new battle manga era, energetic, rebellious, flashy, polished, and unmistakably like a high-impact Japanese manga magazine cover illustration.

She wears a white blouse, a large pink plaid ribbon bow, a pink plaid skirt, a loose pink cardigan slipping off her shoulders, layered necklaces, and a navy school backpack over one shoulder. The background shows a glowing pedestrian bridge or riverside walkway at dusk, lined with lights and cherry trees in full bloom, with a pink-orange-purple sky and sparkling romantic atmosphere. Add exactly 3 small publication info elements on the upper right: a date/price block, a circular issue number badge, and a narrow vertical tag. Add exactly 1 inset bonus poster preview near the lower right above the barcode. She has a fierce focused expression, luminous green eyes, small glossy black-and-magenta horn-like head implants, and long flowing hair whipping outward in all directions. Her body is encased in a high-detail reflective chrome-and-magenta cybernetic exosuit with translucent chest plating, segmented armored shoulders, mechanical gauntlets, exposed joint details, armored thighs, and blade-like lower leg armor. Behind her are 2 large radiant energy wings made of pink crystalline electricity and particle streaks, exploding outward symmetrically. The environment is a vertical futuristic corridor or megacity canyon with layered glass panels, glowing signage, metallic frameworks, blue and cyan lights mixed with dominant hot pink illumination, countless spark-like particles, lens glow, and high-density detail. content: A highly detailed anime illustration in the style of JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure, presented as a dramatic vintage manga character sheet poster for {argument name="character name" default="OpenAI"} personified as a glamorous female stand master. The layout is a single page with 6 distinct sections framed by ornate art nouveau borders and manga panel lines. Main section on the left: a full-body fashion portrait of the character in a confident contrapposto pose, wearing a tailored white suit with emerald green and black accents, gold trim, a long cape lined in teal, fitted vest, corset-like torso panel, high-waisted pants, heeled shoes, gloves, chain accessories, circular hair ornaments, earrings, and multiple OpenAI logo emblems integrated into the outfit. The belt buckle reads GPT, the pant leg has vertical text reading “SAFETY ★ ALIGNMENT ★ BENEFIT,” and the jacket sleeve shows the OpenAI name and logo. Her hair is silver-white, styled in elaborate curled twin buns and long ringlets, with glossy emerald accessories and JoJo-inspired luxury fashion detailing. Top left section: a cream parchment title panel with the OpenAI logo and the large text “OpenAI”, plus 3 text blocks reading “STAND NAME: GPT-∞”, “[dʒi: pi: ti: mu: geni ti]”, and “STAND MASTER: OPENAI”, followed by an italic Spanish quote: “La curiosidad es el prompt, el conocimiento es la respuesta, y la humanidad… es el contexto.” Top right section: a close-up portrait panel of the same woman from the shoulders up, turned partly away with one hand raised elegantly, against a dark purple manga background with 4 large stylized purple sound effect glyphs. Add a Spanish speech bubble with smaller English translation beneath it: “Mi propósito es extender el potencial de la humanidad.” and “(My purpose is to extend humanity’s potential.)” Center-right section: a stand ability information box titled “STAND ABILITY: [INFINITE CONTEXT]” with Spanish descriptive text beneath: “Permite analizar, conectar y generar conocimiento ilimitado a partir de cualquier información existente.” Lower center-right section: a humanoid robotic stand in a dynamic reaching pose, feminine and sleek, with a glossy black faceplate displaying the OpenAI knot logo, white biomechanical armor, emerald glowing seams, gold accents, and several floating holographic rings and data panels orbiting around it. The rings contain readable words including “DATA”, “CREATIVITY”, “REASONING”, and a distorted futuristic label similar to “RETRIEVAL/AGENT”. The background is cosmic and starry with dramatic energy effects. Bottom right section: a smaller rear three-quarter portrait panel of the woman looking over her shoulder with a confident smile and one finger near her chin, again over a purple manga background with 3 large stylized sound effect glyphs. Add a Spanish speech bubble with two lines: “¿ME PREGUNTAS SI TENGO LÍMITES?” and “MI ÚNICO LÍMITE ES TU IMAGINACIÓN.” Bottom left section: a circular JoJo-style stat chart with 6 labeled attributes in Spanish, showing “POTENCIAL ∞”, “VELOCIDAD A”, “ALCANCE ∞”, “DURABILIDAD B”, “PRECISIÓN A”, and “POTENCIA A”. Under it, include a small cream biography box titled “OPENAI” with Spanish text: “Fundada: 2015 (San Francisco, EE. UU.)” and “Misión: Asegurar que la inteligencia artificial general beneficie a toda la humanidad.” Use a richly inked manga print aesthetic, detailed crosshatching, cel shading, aged paper texture, elegant cream margins, deep emerald, ivory, black, and gold palette, exaggerated JoJo fashion anatomy, sharp linework, dramatic comic-book composition, and luxurious supernatural sci-fi energy.

Include exactly 8 numbered memory scenes arranged from top to bottom on the central paper path, each with a red circle number and Chinese handwritten annotations beside it: scene 1 is a boy crouching outdoors aiming a slingshot under a tree; scene 2 is two children running with a metal hoop and stick in an alley; scene 3 is two children crouching over small firecrackers on the ground with smoke and red paper debris; scene 4 is a tiny old-fashioned neighborhood shop counter labeled “供销社”, with one child buying snacks from the shopkeeper and shelves packed with goods; scene 5 is a bustling market fair with many adults, baskets, poultry, produce, and a bicycle vendor; scene 6 is an open-air village opera stage with red curtains, performers in colorful traditional costumes, and a seated audience; scene 7 is two children at a tree, one climbing or reaching into a nest while another watches below, with a green tin frog toy nearby; scene 8 is a man riding a motorcycle with a child passenger down an old street at sunset. Add surrounding retro printed items with visible vintage Chinese cover text, including a left-side old children’s book, a right-side magazine titled “儿童画报 1985 5”, a small blue booklet near the lower left, and a worn exercise notebook near the lower right. At the bottom, place a bold red banner with large cream-colored Chinese text reading {argument name="bottom quote" default="那时候日子不快，但快乐很满。"} and a second smaller line reading {argument name="sub quote" default="很多东西都旧了，可一想起来还是会发亮。"}. The entire image should feel tactile, cinematic, and emotionally warm, combining photorealistic objects with handcrafted poster design, dense storytelling details, tiny human figures, nostalgic 1980s–1990s Chinese childhood atmosphere, and soft golden lighting.
title: Nostalgic 80s 90s China Memory Poster
description: A warm retro collage poster depicting eight iconic childhood memories from 1980s–1990s China, ideal for nostalgic editorial art or social media storytelling.

content: A richly detailed vertical editorial travel illustration of a bustling Seoul market alley rendered in polished hand-drawn realism with warm cinematic lighting, dense urban storytelling, and highly legible signage. The scene is packed with a large crowd of pedestrians, shoppers, diners, street-food customers, musicians, and commuters in a narrow neighborhood market street, viewed from a slightly elevated eye level so the full alley feels layered and alive. At the top left, a large illustrated poster reads “WHERE IS {argument name="character name" default="KYLE"}?” with the subtitle “Can you find Kyle in Seoul?” in bold playful English typography, styled like a search-and-find book cover. The environment should clearly be Seoul, with a visible Namsan tower in the distant skyline, tangled overhead power lines, rooftop seating, stacked low-rise buildings, shop signs in Korean, and a subway entrance sign on the right showing line numbers 4, 2, 4, 4 and the bilingual text “서울역 방면 / To Seoul Station.” Include exactly 15 major visible signs or text panels: 1) the “WHERE IS {argument name="character name" default="KYLE"}?” poster, 2) “할머니 손칼국수”, 3) a hanging vertical sign “낙원상가 2F”, 4) a small blue street sign, 5) a vertical sign “이름 떡볶이”, 6) the large market arch sign “황진다운시장 영”, 7) a vertical orange sign “커피”, 8) a wall mural map with “남산 가는길”, 9) the subway sign with “출입구 4” and “서울역 방면 / To Seoul Station”, 10) the produce sign “경성 야채”, 11) the lower produce sign “신선한 채소”, 12) a handwritten busker sign, 13) the street-food cart sign “호떡·어묵·붕어빵”, 14) the menu board “오늘의 추천 김밥 떡볶이 순대 튀김”, and 15) the delivery box text “빠른 배달”. Populate the alley with exactly 8 vendor or activity zones: 1) a noodle restaurant at left under a red-and-white awning with seated diners, 2) a vegetable stall with stacked produce crates, 3) a busking duo with guitar and percussion, 4) a central street-food cart selling hotteok, fish cake, and bungeoppang, 5) a standing crowd eating snacks and holding cups, 6) a small magic performance table in the lower center with cards and cups, 7) a painter at an easel near the lower left, and 8) a scooter delivery cluster at the lower right. Add exactly 6 notable background accents: 1) rooftop diners on the upper right terrace, 2) a cat lounging on a roof ledge upper left, 3) colorful market umbrellas in the middle distance, 4) stairways and narrow side passages, 5) dense balconies and windows full of plants and people, and 6) the distant tower and skyline. The crowd should feel extremely varied in age and clothing, mostly casual contemporary Korean street fashion in jackets, hoodies, backpacks, skirts, slacks, and sneakers, with a few office workers and students. Hide a single subtly distinct person meant to be the findable target, {argument name="target outfit" default="a young man in a blue hoodie with yellow lettering"}, integrated naturally among the central crowd rather than spotlighted. Use a vibrant but grounded palette of brick red, teal, forest green, cream, mustard, asphalt gray, and sky blue. Emphasize intricate linework, readable Korean text, observational city details, lively human gestures, and the playful feel of a premium “Where’s Waldo?” style Seoul search poster. Aspect ratio 2:3.
title: Find Kyle in a Seoul Market
description: A dense search-and-find style illustration of a lively Seoul market street, ideal for posters, social media showcase images, or editorial travel artwork.

content: A full-color manga page in the style of a dramatic sports manga, showing an intense soccer match inside a huge domed stadium packed with a blue-and-white crowd. Use sharp ink lines, dense crosshatching, screentone texture, dynamic speed lines, and vivid anime coloring as if a black-and-white manga page has been professionally colorized. The composition is a single page with 3 panels: 1 large main panel covering most of the page, plus 2 narrow diagonal inset panels stacked along the left side. In the main panel, show a steeply tilted wide-angle view of the penalty area and goal from an elevated sideline perspective, with the green grass stretched by perspective and filled with directional hatching. Count 6 visible players in the main panel: 4 blue-uniform players and 2 white-uniform players, plus 1 goalkeeper in yellow at the goal. The most prominent player is seen from behind in the lower center-right wearing a blue jersey with “HUGO” and the number 9, running toward the play with one arm extended. Near him on the lower right edge, show another player in a white jersey labeled “ISAGI” with the number 11, also running forward. In the midground, show 4 more field players contesting the ball: 3 in blue and 1 in white, with one white-uniform player diving or lunging horizontally from the right toward the center. The goal stands near the top center-left, with the yellow goalkeeper bracing in front of the net. Add 3 speech bubbles in the main panel, large white manga balloons with hand-lettered uppercase English text: “BUT I WANT TO WIN THE WORLD CUP...”, “...AS THE SECOND-BEST AND AS A MID-FIELDER.”, and “...THE WORLD RECORD FOR MOST TIMES WINNING THE WORLD CUP...”. In the left-side inset area, create 2 diagonal panels. The upper inset panel shows a close-up of a dark-haired character in blue, partly obscured by a soft rectangular blur over the center of the face and torso area, with a small speech bubble that says, “YOICHI ISAGI, DID YOU KNOW...”. The lower inset panel shows a close-up of a reddish-haired character with a wide blue eye, sweat on the face, and a pale blue background, looking surprised or stunned. Maintain bold black panel borders, dramatic foreshortening, and a high-energy tournament atmosphere. Use a blue, green, white, and yellow palette with strong contrast and authentic manga-page coloring aesthetics.
title: Colorized Soccer Manga Page
description: This generates a dramatic full-color sports manga page with a tilted stadium soccer scene, inset close-up panels, and bold dialogue, ideal for manga coloring tests or anime-style comic art.

content: A fully colored shonen manga action page in the style of a high-energy pirate battle comic, presented as a single comic page with 4 visible panels separated by thick white gutters and slightly tilted panel borders. Use bold black ink lines, dense crosshatching, speed lines, cel-style coloring, dramatic foreshortening, and exaggerated impact effects. The scene shows a muscular, towering giant warrior with tan skin, a horned helmet, wild black hair and beard, fur-trimmed black clothing, a wide studded metal belt, and a massive spiked club, battling a swordsman in dark blue clothing and armor-like headgear. Top panel: an extreme close-up of a huge clenched fist thrusting toward the viewer with explosive perspective, the giant shouting “GUNGNIR !!!” in a jagged speech balloon, and another balloon reading “GWOAH !!!”; add large red Japanese sound effects and a small “DOOM!!” impact text. Middle wide panel: the giant swings upward and roars “IKOKU SOVEREIGNTY !!!” while the blue-clad opponent recoils at left; include a speech balloon saying “GAH!” and large purple Japanese sound effects with a small “WHONK!!”. Bottom left narrow panel: a cropped close-up setup panel with two stacked speech balloons reading “THREE SWORD STYLE.” and “RED OGRE…”, with the speaker mostly off-frame and partially obscured. Bottom right large panel: the giant drives a massive wooden spiked club across the frame in a violent horizontal smash, shouting “GIANT TROMMA !!!”; include smaller impact balloons reading “DWUAH !!!” and “THWAM!!”, plus oversized red Japanese sound effects. Backgrounds should be mostly pale sky blue with heavy motion lines and flying debris. Preserve the feel of a professionally colored weekly manga page: saturated reds, blues, purples, tan skin tones, cream fur textures, black shadows, and crisp white speech balloons with hand-lettered comic text.
title: Colored Shonen Manga Battle Page
description: This prompt generates a dynamic fully colored manga action page with four comic panels, ideal for recreating dramatic anime-style battle scenes and manga coloring tests.

content: A cleanly colored manga page in a modern romantic-comedy style, presented as a 6-panel comic layout with crisp black panel borders on a white page. The scene takes place outdoors on a bright day with blue sky, soft clouds, leafy green trees, paved walkway, and queue posts with chain barriers. The main subject is a teenage anime girl with a short blond bob haircut, loose windblown strands, large golden-brown eyes, light blush, and a serious slightly embarrassed expression. She wears a floppy dog-ear hat with cream fur and a small blue polka-dot cap detail, a blue school-style cardigan or blazer over a white shirt, and a red patterned necktie, while holding a pink swirled soft-serve ice cream cone. A teenage boy in a dark blue sweater and white collared shirt appears in 3 panels, his face obscured by a soft rectangular blur, also wearing a matching floppy dog-ear hat. The page should have exactly 6 panels: 2 small panels across the top row, 1 large central close-up panel spanning the width, and 3 panels along the bottom row. Top-left panel: the boy faces forward with the girl turning sharply toward him, her hair and hat flaring from motion, outdoor background with a signboard, and hand-drawn manga sound effects in black. Top-right panel: a small chibi-style version of the girl stands near the chain barrier, looking smug and flustered while holding the ice cream, with a speech bubble that says "THAT'S A LOOK OF ACCOMPLISHMENT." and small floating sound-effect text near her head. Center panel: a dramatic close-up portrait of the girl against open sky, hair blowing across her face, one strand crossing her mouth, dog ears visible, staring forward with a calm, stunned look; include a vertical speech bubble on the right with Japanese text and a small English sound effect reading "PLOP". Bottom-left panel: the boy, face blurred, speaking with a speech bubble that says "I'VE BEEN THINKING THIS FOR A WHILE, BUT..." Bottom-middle panel: the girl in side view lifting a hand toward her mouth while holding the pink ice cream in the other hand, with a speech bubble saying "THANKS." Bottom-right panel: the boy reaches toward the girl's mouth or cheek with his hand as if wiping off cream, with a speech bubble that says "YOU GOT SOME CREAM OVER HERE." Keep all visible comic text and sound effects integrated into the art, including "WAH!", "FWSH", and the English dialogue. Use polished manga coloring over inked line art: soft cel shading, slightly textured watercolor-like fills, warm skin tones, glossy eyes, fine crosshatching accents, and expressive linework. Emphasize romantic tension, wind movement, and the contrast between comedic chibi reaction and tender close-up drama.
title: Colored Manga Romance Comedy Page
description: This prompt generates a fully colored multi-panel manga page with a windy romantic-comedy school-date scene, ideal for manga coloring tests and anime comic illustrations.

content: A clean manga-coloring test page styled like an official One Piece chapter cover on a light gray background. At the very top, place the large black-and-white ONE PIECE logo with the skull wearing a yellow straw hat with a red band, integrated rope elements, and the silhouette inside the lettering. Centered beneath it, add the subtitle text {argument name="chapter title" default="Chapter 1177: FURIOUS"} in bold black serif italics. Below that, create one large rectangular full-color illustration framed by a thin black border. The scene shows Nico Robin, a young woman with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair and pale skin, seated in a garden with her knees drawn up, planting flowers. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur censor block. She wears a loose white short-sleeve shirt and black-and-white horizontal striped thigh-high socks, giving a casual, slightly playful look. Around her are 3 small One Piece characters helping or watching: on the left, Tony Tony Chopper in a straw hat and blue overalls holding a small shovel near freshly dug soil; in the right foreground, another small chibi-like Chopper figure wearing a blue cap with round yellow ear covers labeled “MOGO” and pink shorts, turned partly away; near the center-left foreground, a tiny helper with goggles and a hat standing by the flower bed. The garden is whimsical and storybook-like: a huge old tree with a thick twisting trunk fills the left side, a white picket fence runs behind the flower beds, and a crooked cozy cottage with blue scalloped roof tiles, dormer windows, flower boxes, and a round wooden door stands on the right. The sky is bright blue with a few puffy white clouds. In the flower bed, show exactly 3 distinct flower clusters being planted: 1 pink cluster in Robin’s hands, 1 white cluster to the right, and 1 orange cluster farther right, with several dug holes in the brown soil and chopped tree stumps in the foreground. Add a caption strip overlapping the bottom of the illustration with uppercase serif text: {argument name="caption text" default="READER REQUEST: \"ROBIN PLANTING FLOWERS IN A BED DUG UP BY MOLES\" BY MRS. FUJI"}. Beneath the image, center the credit line {argument name="author text" default="By EIICHIRO ODA"} in bold black type, and below it a smaller line reading {argument name="credit line" default="Translation: STEPHEN PAUL • Lettering: VANESSA SATONE"}. Use crisp inked manga linework with vibrant hand-colored fills, slightly textured shading, and an authentic colored manga cover-page aesthetic.

content:
Generate a full color Chinese-text manga about this {argument name="character" default="OpenAI researcher, Chen Boyuan"} (first picture), who works on improving the text rendering capability of ChatGPT Image 2 model for the upcoming release. (in the background there is boba tea and a banana taped to the wall with a single slice of duct tape). The model can render insanely small Chinese text when he tried generating some detailed and beautiful multilingual infographics handdrawn-style poster about his hometown, {argument name="location" default="Wuxi"} on his computer screen. His hard work pays off and the team was impressed by the absurdly good quality of multilingual text performance of his model, seeing all the languages it can write. When he takes a break with one hand holding his phone, he received a translated text message from Sam Altman on his phone (avatar attached as second picture), asking him to take a look at the rendered multilingual text in an image he just generated to congrat the team, since Sam only knows English. However, make it funny by let Boyuan outrage (typical manga style) at the end by seeing Sam's generated image contains a "稳稳地接住你" phrase at the central location in an otherwise perfectly rendered image that's used to congrat the team, because this sentence has been memed as an unnatural but funny Chinese sentence GPT likes to use on Chinese internet. Boyuan should rage "God! It learned to 'catch' again!" (with teammates as tiny heads on the side, sweating and saying in Chinese "we are working hard to fix it!"). At the very bottom of the manga, add a tiny line of footnote (very tiny)in Chinese that "note: the entire manga, including this footnote and picture in picture, are all generated with gpt image 2 at once without editing or multiple steps."

Additional Instructions: Use vertical 1440x2560 image layout, with first row about this researcher working hard, second row about his result on {argument name="location" default="Wuxi"} with multiple languages, third row shows the team excitement, fourth row split into left and right where left shows he takes a break and the phone received a message, right panel shows Sam's text message, and fifth row shows Sam's picture and Chen Boyuan's reaction. No narration except for the first row. Avoid Chinese map. All characters should be in manga style. The banana background should only appear in the first panel and the tape should be a single slice of tape, not a cross tape. The banana and tape decoration should be small as a insignificant easter egg for people to find. OpenAI logo shall only appear on Chen Boyuan's cloth, not elsewhere. No mugs in the scene since we already have the boba. Sam should only appear in the text message panel. The entire manga should be appear as a professional photo of a physical page in a manga book. In the lower right most corner of the poster there is a small "Ultra-small Chinese is also clearly readable:" with a paragraph of much smaller Chinese that begins with "(This is an ultra-small font size test) Wuxi is the author's hometown, so I made this poster, and the Chinese is finally fixed. Haven't been home for many years, really want to eat hairy crabs!" (ultra small).
title: Detailed multilingual Chinese manga prompt
description: A very complex prompt for generating a full-page manga featuring specific characters, vertical layouts, and precise multilingual text rendering in Chinese and English.

content: A highly detailed anime illustration of a seated young woman in an elegant Japanese-inspired fantasy kimono composition, centered on a clean warm off-white background. She has long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black with deep blue-violet undertones"} hair with blunt bangs and very long flowing side lengths, with red and blue ribbon strands woven through the hair. Her eyes are large and luminous {argument name="eye color" default="crimson red"}, and her expression is calm, soft, and slightly wistful. She wears an ornate floral hairpiece on the right side of her head made of 4 major blossoms in red, white, pale blue, and blue, with dangling gold ornaments and tassels. Her outfit is a richly patterned kimono in {argument name="kimono colors" default="red, black, pale blue, cream, and touches of purple"}, covered in cherry blossoms, stylized flowers, butterflies, cords, bows, and hanging tassel decorations. The sleeves are oversized and flowing, with visible red cord knots and floral appliqué details. She sits in a graceful curled pose with one hand near her face, bare legs prominently visible, wearing white tabi-like socks and elaborate red-and-black platform sandals with bows. Include exactly 2 birds: 1 blue bird perched on the left branch and 1 small red-and-blue bird nestled among flowers at the lower right. Include exactly 3 butterflies: 2 near the upper left and 1 near the lower center by her legs. Frame the composition with plum blossom branches, hanging Japanese ornaments, tassels, diamond charms, and long fabric streamers. Add a large circular decorative motif behind her upper body and a tall vertical banner-like ornament on the right side. The overall palette should balance vermilion red, black, ivory, pale cyan, sky blue, and lavender. content:
Create an "{argument name="meme style" default="Out the Window"}" meme-style four-panel comic titled "{argument name="title" default="How to Improve Development Efficiency with AI? 如何借助 AI 提升开发效率？"}", featuring dialogues in speech bubbles. 

--ar 9:16

Characters:

- Boss: Asian male wearing a suit, with neatly parted hair.
- Employee Xiaoming: Male, wearing a blue checkered shirt.
- Employee Xiaohong: Female.
- Employee Xiaohu: Female, Asian, straight bangs hairstyle, wearing red-framed glasses.

Panel Descriptions:

- Top panel (single wide panel):
  The boss asks during a meeting: "How can we use AI to improve development efficiency? 我们要如何借助 AI 提升开发效率？"

  Three employees sit listening.

- Second panel (single wide panel):
  Each employee responds individually:

  - Xiaoming: "We use AI to write unit tests. 我们用 AI 写单元测试"
  - Xiaohong: "We use AI for code reviews. 我们用 AI 做代码审查"
  - Xiaohu: “Vibe Coding。”

- Third row (two panels):
  - Left panel: The boss looks furious.
  - Right panel: Employee Xiaohu is humorously kicked out of a high-rise window.
title: Out the Window meme comic prompt
description: A detailed prompt to generate a four-panel comic in the style of the 'Out the Window' meme, including character descriptions and panel content.

content: A close-up anime fantasy illustration of a cute young girl in a luminous cathedral-like hall, reaching one hand toward the viewer in strong foreshortened perspective as if inviting them forward. She has long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="light blue"} hair spilling from under an oversized glossy green bunny-eared hood, with one ear flopping across the top left and the other hanging down on the right. Her face is mostly obscured by her hair and the hood, creating a mysterious, shy composition. She wears an elaborate frilly outfit in white, green, and pastel pink, with lace trim, ribbons, and a pink bow at the collar. In her other arm she holds 1 plush toy: a white rabbit doll with pink inner ears, a wide open smile, one button X eye, and a small jester-like collar with tiny bells. The background is a grand blue crystal palace interior with tall glowing arches, soft bloom lighting, reflective floors, sparkling particles, and dreamy ethereal atmosphere. Highly polished anime game key art style, vibrant cool tones, soft highlights, delicate linework, glossy fabric textures, cinematic depth, centered composition, portrait cropped at the chest, whimsical and magical mood.

content: Create a black-and-white manga page with 4 stacked horizontal panels, clean black gutters, screentone shading, dramatic speed lines, and polished seinen-style linework. The page features two youthful anime characters with modern casual clothing and short dark hair, with the face area of both characters obscured by a soft square blur censor block. Panel 1: a slim young person with messy short dark hair and a collared shirt clenches one fist near their chest, body angled left, surrounded by an intense fiery aura effect in the background, looking emotional and defensive. On the right side, place a large jagged vertical speech balloon containing this Japanese text: 「何十時間も魂を削って描いた一枚と、プロンプト打ち込んで数秒で出した画像が同じ価値なわけないでしょ！ふざけないで！」. Panel 2: a second young person with slightly taller build, short dark hair, a dark zip jacket over a light shirt, raises one index finger calmly as if explaining a point. Add a rounded rectangular speech box on the right with this Japanese text: 「投下した労働時間で価値が決まるという典型的な“労働価値説の誤謬”だ。市場における価値は、出力された結果を受け手がどう評価するかで決まる」. Panel 3: the taller character gently pats the shorter character on the head; include a small hand-pat sound effect near the hand reading 「ポン」. The shorter character looks up in surprise. On the right side, add a large oval vertical speech balloon with this Japanese text: 「でも俺の市場価値基準はすごくシンプルだよ。君が俺のために照れてくれるこの数秒間に、何十時間分の価値も感じてるから」. Panel 4: close-up of the shorter character blushing intensely with spiral eyes, sweat drops, trembling expression, open mouth, and dense hatching on the cheeks, overwhelmed with embarrassment. Fill the background with dramatic radiating speed lines. Add a large jagged vertical speech balloon on the right with this Japanese text: 「だ、誰がアンタのために照れるか…っ！自意識過剰よ！」. Add two sound effects: a small 「プル…」 near the shoulder and a larger shaky handwritten 「カァァァ」 along the lower left side. Keep the whole page monochrome, highly expressive, romantic-comedy manga tone, with strong emotional contrast between heated argument, cool explanation, teasing affection, and flustered payoff.
