content: A dramatic black-and-white manga page in a seinen style, rendered with dense screentones, sharp ink lines, high contrast lighting, and expressive Japanese comic layout. The page has 4 stacked panels with vertical Japanese speech bubbles and bold sound effects, showing a tense confrontation between two office workers in a modern workspace. In the top panel, a young woman with a short messy bob haircut, slim but curvy build, wearing a fitted button-up blouse with rolled sleeves and a dark pencil skirt, slams one hand hard onto a desk in anger, leaning forward toward the viewer with explosive impact lines and a large jagged speech bubble. In the second panel, a young man with dark tousled hair, slim build, wearing a black leather jacket over a light shirt and a necklace, is shown from the chest up in a calm, confident pose, touching his face while speaking. In the third panel, the man pins the woman against a wall in a close, intimate kabedon pose, one arm braced beside her head; she looks flustered and tense while he speaks near her face, creating a sudden romantic-comedic shift in mood. In the bottom panel, an overhead view reveals the office setting: 2 characters standing near a desk with 1 computer monitor, 1 keyboard, 1 mouse, 1 office chair, and scattered papers on a tiled floor; the woman is curled inward shyly and trembling while the man stands relaxed beside her. Include exactly 4 panels, exactly 4 visible speech bubbles total, and visible Japanese manga typography throughout. Add a rectangular mosaic censor blur over each character's face in every panel, as if anonymized for sharing online. Background details should include office walls, desk edges, speed lines, burst effects, and tonal gradients. The overall feeling is intense argument turning into manipulative flirtation, like a viral out-of-context manga screenshot.
title: Censored Office Manga Confrontation
description: A gritty monochrome manga page showing a heated office argument that shifts into a kabedon scene, useful for recreating dramatic viral manga-style screenshots.

content: A cute hand-drawn four-panel comic in a soft, warm, slice-of-life style on a light cream background with thick black panel borders and slightly textured paper grain. Use simple rounded cartoon cat anatomy, expressive faces, clean black outlines, muted natural colors, and a gentle manga-like presentation. In the top-left panel, show 2 cats: a brown tabby cat with dark stripes and white muzzle sitting with eyes closed, looking pleased, while a mostly white cat with dark brown patches on the head stands beside it and affectionately licks the tabby's cheek; add 2 small black musical notes above them to suggest happy grooming. In the top-right panel, show the white-and-brown patched cat in the foreground looking toward a small calico kitten standing to the right; include a speech bubble containing the Japanese text "めい" above the kitten. In the bottom-left panel, show 3 cats together: the brown tabby on the left with a surprised or blank expression, the white patched cat on the right looking cheerful, and the small calico kitten centered in front between them, looking up. In the bottom-right panel, show a close-up of the brown tabby cat alone, facing forward with narrowed yellow-green eyes and an angry, jealous expression; add 2 short emphasis lines near the face and 1 small puff-shaped anger symbol to the right. Keep the tone cozy and comedic, with the visual joke that the tabby was happy being groomed until the new kitten appears. Use flat colors, minimal shading, and a charming Japanese webcomic feel.

content: A dark fantasy matte painting of a bleak hilltop encampment overlooking a vast cursed wasteland at dusk. In the left foreground, a ragged hanging banner reads "The Pale Lodge Outpost" in large black hand-painted letters, attached to wooden poles and weathered by wind. Beside it stands a tall carved totem post topped with a black raven and draped with bones, skulls, and tattered ornaments. The camp itself contains 4 visible canvas tents: 2 large central tents, 1 medium tent on the left, and 1 smaller tent on the right, all in dirty beige fabric with black occult sigils painted on them, held by ropes, spikes, and crooked poles. Around the tents are 5 hooded human figures in dark robes, standing still like sentries or cultists. Near the center-left is a small campfire casting a faint orange glow. In the right foreground sit 2 brass-and-iron astronomical or ritual instruments on stone pedestals, resembling armillary spheres or astrolabes. The ground is uneven black rock at the edge of a cliff, with scattered stakes, lanterns, banners, and ritual posts. Beyond the outpost stretches a desolate valley of ash-colored plains, winding pale waterways, jagged rock spires, and distant mountain silhouettes. On the horizon, slightly right of center, a sinister dark castle rises from a lone hill. The sky is filled with enormous turbulent storm clouds, with 3 flying creatures or birds silhouetted in the distance and a break in the clouds casting cold, sickly light across the landscape. Use a grim, painterly, highly detailed style with muted sepia, charcoal, umber, and gray tones, dramatic atmospheric perspective, cinematic composition, and the mood of a foreboding fantasy frontier outpost at the edge of a dead world.

content: A Japanese movie-poster style anime illustration, vertical theatrical one-sheet composition, showing a teenage schoolgirl seated alone in a classroom at golden hour. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair, long and slightly wavy, gathered into a loose side braid draped over her right shoulder, with soft bangs and warm rim light along the top of her head and hair edges. She wears a cream or light beige sailor-style school uniform with navy trim and a dark blue ribbon bow at the chest. Her pose is quiet and introspective: sitting at a school desk, leaning her cheek into one hand, shoulders slightly curved, looking off to the side with a tired but calm midweek expression. The scene is lit by strong late-afternoon sunlight pouring in from a tall classroom window on the right, creating glowing highlights, dust motes in the air, soft haze, and a nostalgic cinematic mood. In the dimmer left background, include a green classroom chalkboard and 2 small chalkboard erasers or chalk accessories resting on the tray. Use painterly anime realism with rich filmic contrast, delicate facial rendering, textured brushwork, subtle grain, and dramatic poster lighting. Add Japanese poster typography integrated into the artwork: on the left side, large vertical white brush lettering reading "真ん中" with smaller handwritten-style vertical text above reading "やっと、"; across the lower middle, large pink calligraphic title text reading "水曜日" diagonally; on the upper right, a vertical tagline reading "週のまんなかで、わっと深呼吸ができる。" Near the lower right, include 3 stacked gold laurel award emblems with small Japanese text inside each. Along the bottom center, add 2 lines of small Japanese tagline text, then a credits block in small Japanese film-poster typography. In the bottom right corner, place a large release date reading {argument name="release date" default="5.29"} with "ROADSHOW" beneath it. Overall feeling: soft, melancholic, reassuring, like an understated coming-of-age film poster about an ordinary Wednesday becoming quietly special.

content: A gritty found-footage horror photo taken inside a dim, cramped security office at night, shot with a direct on-camera flash and slight film grain. In the foreground are exactly 2 young women, both partially cropped by the frame and both with their faces heavily blurred into rectangular smudges for privacy. The woman on the left has long dark hair and wears a black top, turned slightly away from camera. The woman on the right has long platinum blonde hair, a low-cut black top, and is holding a black flashlight angled upward in her right hand. Between them in the lower center foreground is 1 small black metal desk fan with visible circular grill. The background reveals a narrow open doorway centered in the image, leading into almost complete darkness. Standing deep inside that doorway is a terrifying rabbit animatronic silhouette with glowing eyes, long upright ears, a huge toothy grin, and faintly visible metallic body details, barely illuminated so it emerges from the shadows. The office walls are off-white and worn, with a black-and-white checker stripe and a thin red stripe running horizontally across the room. On the left wall is 1 colorful “CELEBRATE!” poster featuring animatronic characters, plus 1 smaller character drawing sheet pinned nearby, and 1 black walkie-talkie standing upright on a surface. Near the doorway is 1 silver desk lamp. On the right side are 2 sheets of paper clipped to the wall and a gray filing cabinet in shadow. The door is ajar with the handle visible. Composition should feel like a candid party snapshot turning into a horror scene, with harsh flash-lit foreground subjects, deep black shadows, analog noise, muted colors, unsettling realism, and the hidden monster in the center background as the main scare.

The giant machine has a weathered white-gray metal shell covered in scratches, grime, rust streaks, exposed joints, cables, pistons, and circular mechanical assemblies, with one glowing icy-blue eye. Its massive open hand is extended gently toward the woman, palm up, as if offering help or inviting trust. The woman appears to be a young adult with dark hair tied back, wearing a muted green hooded jacket and dark pants, standing upright and looking up at the robot without fear. Behind them is a dense, worn urban skyline of low rooftops and distant modern skyscrapers fading into haze, under a heavy overcast sky with thick gray storm clouds. The mood is melancholic, intimate, and awe-inspiring, blending post-apocalyptic realism with emotional scale contrast. Use photorealistic rendering, cinematic lighting, desaturated colors, sharp industrial textures, atmospheric perspective, dramatic cloud detail, and a sense of quiet connection between human and machine.

content: A dark monochrome manga-style horror illustration on a pure black background, in a tall vertical poster composition. Centered at the bottom is a small lonely teenage boy with messy short dark hair, sitting on the ground with his knees pulled to his chest and his arms wrapped around them, head slightly bowed, conveying fear, isolation, and helplessness. Towering over him is a gigantic biomechanical demon or armored monster head descending from above, with a long angular skull-like face, sharp chin, narrow hollow eye sockets, layered helmet-like plates, and a jagged open mouth. Surrounding the boy are exactly 2 enormous skeletal clawed hands, one on the left and one on the right, framing him like a cage; each hand has long segmented metallic fingers ending in sharp pointed tips, bent inward menacingly. Render everything in rough scratchy white ink linework and heavy crosshatching against deep black, with intense high-contrast seinen manga energy. Add vivid neon purple paint-like liquid in splashes and long dripping streaks from the monster’s face, the hands, and the ground, pooling around the boy for the only strong color accent. On the upper right side, add vertical Japanese text reading 逃げちゃダメだ, and beneath it in small white English text: EGO BORDER: ACTIVE. The mood is oppressive, psychological, claustrophobic, and nightmarish, like a dark anime poster about inner fear and mental collapse.
title: Dark Manga Monster Poster
description: This prompt generates a high-contrast psychological horror anime poster with a small frightened boy trapped beneath a giant skeletal biomechanical monster, ideal for dramatic cover art or dark character-themed visuals.

content: A gritty vertical anime-mecha poster in distressed screen-print style, inspired by retro military dossiers and Evangelion key art. The main subject is a massive close-up side profile of {argument name="mecha unit name" default="EVANGELION: UNIT-01"}, dominating the right two-thirds of the composition, facing left with its jaws open in a feral scream. The head is angular and biomechanical, with deep purple armor, olive-green accent plates, black metal inner structures, a single long horn projecting diagonally upward to the left, sharp teeth, and a narrow glowing eye. The surface is scratched, chipped, weathered, and inked with heavy comic-style linework. Behind it is a dark navy blueprint background filled with 8 visible technical diagram clusters, white schematic lines, anatomical overlays, cross-sections, labels, measurement marks, and interface graphics. A violent red paint slash explodes diagonally across the upper center and left side, with additional red drips running downward from the mecha’s mouth area. In the lower left corner, 1 small human figure sits hunched on a gray equipment crate: a teenage boy in a short-sleeve white school shirt, dark pants, and white sneakers, elbows on knees, looking down at a glowing handheld device, conveying isolation and anxiety. Add layered poster typography and warning graphics throughout the border: a torn yellow caution sign in the upper right with Japanese warning text and “CAUTION NERV ONLY”; a tall left sidebar with “01”, barcode-like blocks, hazard icons, and red-black labels; large distressed white kanji vertically stacked over the mecha torso; the word {argument name="main title" default="ESCAPE"} in spaced red capitals beneath the kanji; a small black label reading “PILOT: {argument name="pilot name" default="IKARI, SHINJI"}”; a bottom-right NERV logo; and footer text such as classified file markings and top secret stamps. Include 6 clearly readable English technical labels in the blueprint area: “TEST TYPE”, “BIOLOGICAL CONSTRAINT”, “AT FIELD”, “MAGI SYSTEM”, “INTERNAL”, and “CLASSIFIED MATERIAL”. Add Japanese dossier text blocks as authentic graphic texture. The palette is limited to dark indigo, black, crimson red, purple, olive green, dirty beige, and off-white. High contrast, torn-paper collage details, halftone texture, ink splatter, cracked paint, and worn print edges. Cinematic, oppressive, chaotic, collectible poster design, ultra-detailed, sharp, textured, no clean modern polish.
title: Gritty Evangelion Unit-01 Poster
description: This generates a distressed anime-mecha poster featuring a screaming purple biomechanical unit, blueprint overlays, warning graphics, and a small seated pilot figure for collectible print or cover-art use.

content: A dramatic vertical close-up of a roaring cosmic dragon head in side profile, painted in a violent ink-splatter and brushstroke style on a stark white background. The creature has a long sharp horn, angular armored facial plates, a glowing white-green eye, and a huge open mouth lined with jagged teeth. Inside the mouth and throat, instead of flesh, there is a swirling galaxy-like void of luminous {argument name="energy color" default="violet"} and magenta nebula light, with sparkling stars and dust erupting outward like cosmic fire. The dragon’s body is mostly black and deep indigo with glossy highlights, accented by iridescent emerald reflections along the neck and scales. Use expressive high-contrast sumi-e-inspired strokes, splattered paint textures, torn abstract edges, and explosive particle effects concentrated around the eye, mouth, and upper head. Composition should fill the frame with the head tilted upward in a feral scream, cropped tightly for maximum intensity, with no environment and no extra subjects, just raw abstract energy, ink, and celestial debris.
title: Cosmic Ink Dragon Roar
description: A high-contrast fantasy illustration prompt for generating a fierce close-up dragon portrait with galaxy energy effects and expressive ink-splatter styling.

content: A dramatic black-and-white fantasy manga page in highly detailed ink line art and screentone style, vertical comic layout with 2 panels. The top panel is a full-width action scene showing a young anime-style mage boy, about early teen age, standing on cracked rocky ground and casting a powerful spell with his right hand extended toward the left side of the frame. He has short tousled light hair, large serious eyes, and a calm, focused expression. He wears a high-collared cape flowing behind him, a buttoned vest over a shirt, fitted trousers, boots, a belt with pouches, and a holstered wand or small magical tool at his hip, with a gemstone clasp at the neck. In front of his open palm is a large glowing circular magic sigil with intricate concentric symbols and runic ornamentation. The spell erupts into a massive explosion of white light and energy, blasting outward with dense speed lines, black debris clouds, shattered rock fragments, dust, and impact textures filling the background. Large stylized Japanese sound effect lettering is integrated into the art on the left side and along the lower foreground, creating a sense of repeated roaring impacts. The composition is dynamic and high contrast, with the boy positioned right of center and the blast dominating the left half. The bottom panel is a narrower reaction shot, count 1 character visible, showing a long-haired witch in profile facing left, wearing a wide-brimmed pointed hat with an ornate band and gem, and a cloak fastened with a jewel brooch. Her face is partially obscured by a solid rectangular censorship block over the central face area. Behind her, the same explosion and flying rubble continue in the distance. A single vertical Japanese speech balloon on the right reads "…うわ". Use clean manga panel borders, polished professional shonen fantasy comic style, intense motion, crisp pen hatching, screentone shading, and cinematic impact.
title: Fantasy Manga Spell Explosion Page
description: This prompt generates a high-impact monochrome fantasy manga page with a young mage unleashing a huge spell and a smaller reaction panel, suitable for comic storytelling or manga-style concept art.

content: Create a bright pastel anime promotional poster for a fictional slice-of-life comedy series. The composition is a single-page Japanese key visual with one central heroine surrounded by 5 inset moments and blocks of Japanese promotional text, like an anime announcement poster. The main character is {argument name="character name" default="もち子さん"}, a cute anime girl with short white hair fading slightly to silver, large vivid blue eyes, soft blush, and twin low ponytails tied near the shoulders. She wears an oversized black hood shaped like floppy dog ears, round silver goggles resting on top of her head, a black choker with a metallic round ornament, a futuristic white-and-black cropped sleeveless top with dark trim and a small emblem on the chest, detached black arm sleeves, very short white shorts with black edging, a thigh strap on one leg, and a small side pouch on her hip. Her body proportions are youthful anime stylization with a slim, petite build and slightly exaggerated chest, rendered in polished modern moe character design. In the center she stands full body, smiling gently and holding a pen in one hand as if she is about to make a mistake while writing, facing the viewer in a confident but sweet pose. Around her place 5 supporting vignette images of the same character: 1) upper left, a chibi-style scene of her outside with both hands thrown forward, crying dramatically with a huge open mouth; 2) lower left, a comic scene of her collapsed face-down on a desk or floor with scattered papers, exhausted and flustered; 3) upper right, a bust shot where she holds up a paper sign with Japanese writing, looking apologetic; 4) lower right, a cheerful half-body portrait with closed smiling eyes and one fist raised in encouragement; 5) a small background portrait in the top-right area behind text, used like a character callout. Include exactly 2 small white mascot creatures near the bottom center, both round and mochi-like with tiny dot eyes and tiny mouths, one larger and one smaller, floating or standing beside the heroine. Use a soft spring palette with pink, sky blue, mint green, peach, cream, and white, with scattered cherry blossom petals and rounded graphic shapes in the background. The background should feel airy and celebratory, with subtle outdoor scenery blur and decorative swooshes, stars, and bubbles. Fill the poster with Japanese typography in a playful commercial-anime style: a large multicolored title at top left, small header text above it, a red seasonal broadcast announcement, a pink "あらすじ" synopsis box on the left with several lines of body text, a blue explanatory box at bottom left, vertical and angled exclamatory phrases around the character, and a pink production-credit block at bottom right. Add a prominent character name banner in the upper right. Keep all text looking like authentic printed Japanese promotional copy, using rounded colorful fonts for the title and clean magazine-style fonts for the smaller text. Overall mood: adorable, comedic, slightly chaotic, professionally designed anime key art for a new TV series announcement in 16:9 landscape format.
title: Pastel Anime Promo Poster
description: A colorful Japanese anime announcement poster featuring a white-haired mascot girl with multiple comedic inset scenes, ideal for recreating TV-series key visuals or parody promotional art.

content: A cinematic fantasy scene inside a rocky cave during a blizzard, viewed from slightly above campfire level, with 8 characters seated in a circle around a small fire. Outside the cave mouth, a colossal dark mountain rises in the snowstorm, shaped like a sinister pyramid or volcanic fortress, split with glowing crimson-magenta fissures and crowned by a branching, ember-like red energy bloom at the summit; a ring of lava or fire glows at its base across the frozen landscape. The cave interior is warm, amber, and intimate, lit by the fire and a single ornate oil lamp on the right, contrasting with the cold blue-gray storm outside. The group should feel like a high-fantasy adventuring party resting together: 1 regal bird-like humanoid on the left with white feathers, a hooked beak, braided plumage, and layered tribal jewelry; 1 red-haired woman in the left foreground with long braided hair and ornate fantasy garments; 1 young elf-like traveler in blue sitting left of center; 1 small blond elf-like girl at center with pointed ears and clasped hands; 1 elderly king-like man on the right with long white hair, full beard, crown, and dark green robe with gold ornamentation; 1 elegant blond noblewoman beside him in embroidered formal dress; 1 white-haired figure in the foreground right seen mostly from behind in feathered or fur-trimmed clothing; and 1 blue-skinned aquatic-looking woman on the far right with a fin-like headdress, elaborate jewelry, and a cup in hand. Include cups, bowls, plates, bedrolls, sacks, and travel gear scattered around the cave edges. The composition should frame the terrifying glowing mountain through the cave opening behind the party, emphasizing the contrast between sheltered companionship and looming apocalyptic danger. Ultra-detailed textures, realistic fabric and skin, dramatic volumetric firelight, snow streaks driven by wind, moody dark fantasy color grading, painterly realism, epic film still atmosphere, high contrast, rich shadows, masterpiece quality.
title: Fantasy Campfire Before a Crimson Mountain
description: A cinematic dark-fantasy image of 8 adventurers sheltering in a cave around a campfire while a glowing volcanic mountain looms outside, ideal for epic concept art or story illustration.

content: A dynamic anime-style low-angle illustration of two young women in rabbit-themed bodysuits, viewed from below as if the camera is tilted upward and they are looking slightly down toward the viewer. The left girl has {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair in short twin pigtails with curled ends, large red bunny ears, and a glossy bright red high-cut bodysuit with puff sleeves, long opera gloves, a sweetheart-shaped chest panel, and 4 round silver button-like discs on the front. The right girl has long straight brown hair, pale bunny ears, and a glossy white and pale pink version of the same bodysuit design, also with puff sleeves, long gloves, sweetheart chest panel, and 4 round silver discs. Both have slim builds, long legs, expressive wide anime eyes, and mildly surprised, curious expressions as they glance toward each other and slightly toward the viewer. Their hands hang loosely at their sides, almost touching in the center. Place them in front of a vast ruined cathedral or decayed grand stone building with broken arches, skeletal metal framework, shattered windows, and crumbling debris, rendered as a soft-painted anime background. Use a dramatic Dutch angle and strong perspective so the architecture leans with the camera tilt and the characters feel towering and close to the lens. Bright blue sky with large white clouds behind the ruins. Clean cel shading on the characters, painterly detailed background, crisp line art, vibrant but slightly weathered color palette, cinematic composition. Add 3 text elements in the upper right area as graphic design overlay: small uppercase text "ARINKO AGENTS", large bold Japanese text "平和島", and a large white handwritten signature-like script overlapping the background.
title: Low-Angle Anime Bunny Girls in Ruins
description: This prompt generates a tilted low-angle anime poster of two bunny-suited girls against a ruined cathedral background, useful for recreating stylized character-and-background compositions with dramatic perspective.

content: A dark, cinematic anime-horror key visual in a vertical poster composition, set at night inside or beside a shattered window with a huge glowing full moon dominating the background. In the center foreground, a young couple stands in an intimate embrace. The male figure is tall and slim, wearing a dark brown or charcoal hoodie with the hood up, white drawstrings, subtle red blood-like stains on the sleeve and lower hem, and dark red pants. His skin is pale, his long black hair falls over one eye, and the lower half of his face is wrapped in dirty white bandages stained with blood, giving him a disturbing but protective antihero presence. One hand and wrist are also wrapped in bandages. He looks slightly upward and away with a solemn, haunted expression while holding the girl around her back. The female figure is petite with extremely long straight platinum-blonde hair reaching past her waist, wearing a loose white coat or cardigan over a black-and-white outfit and a black choker. She faces him closely with both hands clasped together against his chest, creating a tender contrast against the horror atmosphere. Add 2 ghostly supporting figures in the background: on the left, a pale blonde girl in shadow wearing striped clothing and holding an object close to her chest; on the right, a hooded male figure in profile with glasses or sharp facial lines, his hood marked by a dark blood stain. The environment is filled with floating shards of broken glass, blue moonlight, dust motes, and star-like particles, with deep navy, black, and icy blue tones throughout. Place a stylized red Japanese title at the top right, {argument name="headline text" default="殺戮の天使"}, with a smaller red serif English subtitle beneath it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="Memory Collection"}. Make the overall style a polished live-action cosplay poster blended with anime horror cover art, highly detailed, dramatic rim lighting, glossy fabric textures, supernatural atmosphere, tragic romance mood, and a premium game or visual novel promotional aesthetic.
title: Moonlit Anime Horror Cosplay Poster
description: This prompt generates a dramatic vertical anime-horror promotional poster with a moonlit couple, two shadowy background figures, and a dark supernatural romance atmosphere.

content: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a pale goth girl in a colorful urban playground, shown in a close medium shot as she leans forward and bites a horizontal metal bar with a mischievous, slightly defiant expression. She has long straight {argument name="hair color" default="jet black"} hair with blunt bangs, vivid red eyes, and a delicate face with a small mouth partly pressed against the bar. Her hair is decorated with 3 geometric hair clips on the right side: 1 red triangle clip, 1 blue angular clip, and 1 small gold ring clip. She wears multiple ear piercings including several studs and dangling industrial-style earrings. Her outfit is a black techwear-goth ensemble with 5 visible key pieces: 1 cropped black jacket with red and blue accent stripes, 1 black choker, 1 strappy black top or dress with front buckles, 1 wide black belt with metal hardware, and 1 hanging waist chain. Her sleeves are long and oversized, with white stripe details on one forearm. Both hands grip the bar, one near her mouth and one farther to the side, creating an intimate confrontational pose. The setting is a playground with bright primary-colored equipment: blue posts, red connectors, yellow and red climbing bars, and a patterned rubber floor made of bold geometric blocks in blue, red, yellow, white, and black. In the background are dark green trees and a dramatic graphic sky with large flat shapes in red, orange, blue, black, and white, plus circular sun-like dots, giving the whole scene a posterized pop-art look. Include 1 vertical warning sticker on the left blue post with Japanese text and a small caution icon. Use crisp cel shading, sharp linework, slight glitchy texture accents, ultra-saturated colors, high contrast, a moody cyber-goth fashion vibe, and a dynamic composition centered on the girl's intense gaze and the metal bar.
title: Goth Anime Girl at Playground Bar
description: This prompt generates a bold, high-contrast anime fashion illustration of a black-haired goth girl biting a playground bar, ideal for stylized character art and eye-catching social media visuals.

content: A dynamic anime action illustration of two young martial-arts women fighting inside a traditional Japanese-style wooden dojo. The left fighter is in the foreground, a black-haired girl with a neat bun tied by a yellow ribbon, wearing a sleeveless yellow Chinese kung fu tunic with black trim, loose black pants, and black cloth shoes. She is in a deep low stance on the wooden floor, one fist pulled back and the other punching forward, surrounded by bright red energy trails that arc around her body and sweep across the scene. Water splashes dramatically around her feet as if her movement skims through a shallow layer of water. The right fighter is airborne in the midground, a pale-skinned girl with light lavender hair in two round buns, wearing a short black-and-white cheongsam-inspired battle dress with gold trim, black sheer tights, and black shoes. She performs a flying side kick while a vivid blue energy spiral curls around her in a circular motion. The collision of force between them has cracked and exploded the wooden floor at center-right, with debris and wood fragments flying outward, while dust and smoke billow across the lower right corner. The dojo interior has exposed timber beams, tatami edging, shoji-style windows, and warm natural light entering from the left. Hang a wooden sign above them with the Chinese text {argument name="sign text" default="币安 vs OKX"}. Use a dramatic wide-angle composition, strong foreshortening, cinematic motion blur, intense speed lines, high-detail anime rendering, glossy highlights, clean line art, energetic combat choreography, and a polished poster-like finish. Add exactly 2 visible fighters, 1 overhead wooden sign, 1 cracked floor impact point, 1 red energy effect around the left fighter, and 1 blue energy effect around the right fighter. Optionally place a subtle watermark-like text at the lower right reading {argument name="watermark text" default="UM YouMind"}.
title: Anime Martial Arts Dojo Duel
description: This prompt generates a high-energy anime-style two-girl martial arts battle scene in a wooden dojo, ideal for dramatic promotional art or social media visuals.

content: A dramatic anime action illustration inside an old wooden martial arts hall, showing two young women in mid-battle with explosive motion and elemental energy trails. In the foreground, a fierce female martial artist lunges low toward the viewer in a powerful punching stance, her right fist extended straight ahead and her body twisted dynamically. She has dark black hair tied into a messy high bun with loose strands and red ribbons, sharp intense eyes, and a focused combative expression. She wears a white traditional Chinese martial arts top with red trim, red tassel frog closures, and subtle embroidered patterns, paired with flowing deep red pants and black cloth shoes with red accents. Red ribbon-like energy and glowing scarlet brushstroke arcs coil around her arms, torso, and legs, sweeping across the frame like fiery calligraphy. In the upper right, a second young woman leaps through the air in a defensive or spellcasting pose, one hand stretched outward. She has {argument name="hair color" default="light purple"} hair styled in two buns with trailing strands and ornate gold hair ornaments. She wears a dark green Chinese-style dress with gold embroidery, black stockings, and dark shoes. Bright blue water-like energy spirals around her in a large circular arc, splashing and glittering with luminous droplets. Set the scene in a weathered dojo or wuguan interior with tall wooden beams, hanging lanterns, broken floorboards, flying splinters, dust, sparks, and debris exploding from the impact of the fight. Include one large wooden signboard above them with the black calligraphy text 武术会, plus two vertical hanging banners, the left reading 以武会友 and the right reading 刚柔并济. Use a low-angle cinematic perspective, strong foreshortening, extreme motion, dense particles, and dramatic warm-vs-cool color contrast between the red and blue energy. Highly detailed anime painting, ultra-dynamic composition, sharp linework, rich textures, glowing effects, volumetric lighting, and epic battle key visual quality.
title: Anime Martial Arts Duel in Dojo
description: This prompt generates a high-energy anime battle scene between two female martial artists in a wooden dojo, ideal for action poster art or dramatic character showcase imagery.

content: A dramatic anime action illustration inside a traditional wooden martial arts hall, captured at a low angle with intense cinematic perspective. In the foreground, a fierce young female martial artist with {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair in a messy high bun tied with red ribbons lunges forward in a deep fighting stance, one fist thrust toward the viewer. She wears a white Chinese-style kung fu top with red trim and tassel frog closures, wide red pants, and black martial arts shoes with red accents. Her expression is focused, aggressive, and determined, with sharp red-tinted eyes. Red energy ribbons and paint-like light trails spiral around her body and punch, scattering sparks and embers. In the upper right, a second young female fighter leaps through the air, partially turned sideways, wearing a dark green qipao-inspired combat dress with ornate gold embroidery, black stockings, and heeled shoes. Her {argument name="second character hair color" default="lavender"} hair is styled in two buns with loose curls and decorative hair ornaments. She casts a martial arts gesture with one hand extended, surrounded by a sweeping arc of luminous blue water-like energy that curves around her body in a near-complete ring. The two elemental forces, red and blue, contrast sharply and imply an imminent clash. The environment is a weathered dojo interior with broken wooden floorboards exploding upward, dust, splinters, and motion debris frozen midair. Warm shafts of light stream through the wooden structure and windows, mixing with glowing particles. Large hanging calligraphy signs are visible, including a central wooden plaque reading {argument name="main sign text" default="武術会"}, with additional vertical banners bearing black Chinese characters on aged paper. Highly detailed anime illustration, dynamic foreshortening, extreme motion, layered effects, rich textures, dramatic rim lighting, fiery warm highlights against cool blue energy, polished concept art quality, vertical composition.
title: Anime Martial Arts Energy Clash
description: This prompt generates a high-impact anime fight scene between two female martial artists in a traditional dojo, ideal for action posters, splash art, or cinematic fantasy illustrations.

The cavernous room is framed by massive dark stone pillars detailed with {argument name="accent color" default="glowing blue"} ethereal cracks and veins. The lighting is dramatic and moody, featuring a rich color palette of deep blacks, tarnished golds, and cool blue accents. Format 16:9.

content: A cinematic, photorealistic shot of a young woman with {argument name="hair style" default="long wavy brown hair with small braids"} wearing {argument name="clothing style" default="rustic, heavy brown historical garments with fur trim and leather pouches"}. She is kneeling in the snow and tenderly hugging a massive, gentle {argument name="animal type" default="brown grizzly bear"}. Both the woman and the bear have their eyes closed in a peaceful, affectionate embrace. The bear rests its large head against her. The setting is a {argument name="environment" default="snowy pine forest"} during winter, with soft, natural daylight. Light snowflakes are dusted across the woman's hair and the bear's thick fur. High detail, 8k resolution, fantasy realism.

content: An {argument name="overall theme" default="epic fantasy"} illustration utilizing a {argument name="art style" default="watercolor and ink wash double exposure"} technique on a vintage parchment background. The overall composition forms the {argument name="main silhouette subject" default="right-facing profile of a man's head"}. Inside this silhouette is a complex montage of scenes and characters. At the top, a white tree with red leaves stands near a cliffside castle, with a white winged creature flying on the left and a black dragon breathing fire on the right. Below this, a blonde woman sits on a throne made of swords, while a cloaked figure stands on a hill nearby. In the center right, a romantic couple consisting of a blonde woman and a dark-haired man in a fur collar gaze at each other. To their left stands a knight in full plate armor holding a sword. Below them is a group of 3 figures: a man, a young woman, and a child. At the bottom, a large white wolf head is on the left, and a stag stands near a castle on the right. In the bottom center, a flaming heart hovers above 2 crossed swords and 1 golden crown. The {argument name="dominant color palette" default="muted earthy tones with splashes of red and orange"} creates a dramatic, legendary atmosphere.

content: A traditional Chinese ink wash landscape painting featuring a giant mecha integrated into the misty mountains. The mecha, resembling {argument name="mecha type" default="Evangelion Unit-01"}, features a purple and green color scheme with a prominent horn and the number "01" on its shoulder. Its massive form dissolves into expressive, dripping black ink washes, seamlessly blending into the rocky mountain formations. The surrounding landscape includes steep, jagged peaks painted with teal and green washes, cascading waterfalls, ancient pine trees, and small traditional pavilions perched on the cliffs. A flock of birds flies through the dense fog filling the valleys. In the top left corner, vertical traditional Chinese calligraphy reads {argument name="main text" default="初號機"} followed by {argument name="sub text" default="人之造物 亦為山水"}, accompanied by a red artist seal stamp. Another red seal is stamped in the bottom right corner. The entire artwork is rendered on textured, aged rice paper, utilizing dynamic brushstrokes and atmospheric perspective typical of classical Shan shui art.

content: A cinematic anime illustration of a mature woman looking into a dark mirror, but her reflection shows her as a young child. The foreground features the tall, mature woman seen from behind in a three-quarter view, with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair, pale skin, and wearing a dark dress adorned with black feather-like accents on the shoulders. She is reaching out to touch the mirror with her right hand. The mirror reflects a young child version of herself with {argument name="eye color" default="golden"} eyes, slightly pointed ears, and a simple white dress with red ribbon bows. The child's hand is pressed against the glass, perfectly aligning with the older woman's hand. The scene has dark, moody, cinematic lighting with a muted, almost sepia-toned color palette, creating high contrast between the pale skin and the dark background. Vertical Japanese text is placed on the left reading {argument name="left text" default="吸血鬼の始祖 怪異の王 キスショット・アセロラオリオン・ハートアンダーブレード"} and on the right reading {argument name="right text" default="私は・私の中にいる もう一人の私"}.

content: A highly detailed, {argument name="art style" default="hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render"} of an {argument name="historical setting" default="ancient Chinese street scene inspired by Along the River During the Qingming Festival"}. The elevated, wide-angle perspective looks down upon a bustling dirt crossroad surrounded by traditional wooden buildings with intricate grey tiled roofs. On the left, a building features a sign reading "安居客栈" with red lanterns hanging outside. The scene is densely populated with dozens of villagers, merchants, and travelers in traditional period clothing. People are engaged in various activities: carrying woven baskets on shoulder poles, tending to market stalls under large wooden parasols, riding horses, and pulling a wooden cart with large spoked wheels in the lower right. A large, leafy green tree stands centrally among the shops, and weeping willow branches frame the extreme left foreground. The atmosphere is lively and dusty, illuminated by {argument name="lighting" default="warm afternoon sunlight"} that casts sharp, intricate shadows across the highly textured, hyper-detailed environment.

A cinematic sci-fi illustration of a vast, ornate space station museum orbiting an {argument name="planet type" default="Earth-like planet"}. In the foreground, a man in a dark utility jumpsuit carefully cleans a large, framed {argument name="art style" default="classical landscape"} painting. To the left, a classical marble bust is bound in wire. The zero-gravity environment features floating artifacts, including wrapped bundles and framed paintings suspended in mid-air. Massive arched windows reveal a breathtaking view of space. {argument name="atmosphere" default="Volumetric light rays stream through the dusty atmosphere"}, illuminating the grand, decaying architecture. A hanging dark banner reads "{argument name="banner text" default="THE MEMORY OF BEAUTY OUTLIVES US
CARE FOR IT.

MUSEUM INITIATIVE
SOL 4127"}". The lighting is dramatic and moody, emphasizing the epic scale of art preservation in space.

content:
{
  "type": "comic book page layout",
  "header": {
    "title": "{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"the AMAZING SPIDER-MAN\"}",
    "subtitle": "{argument name=\"subtitle\" default=\"NO SMALL CHOICES\"}",
    "part": "PART ONE",
    "credits": [
      "ZEB WELLS WRITER",
      "JOHN ROMITA JR. PENCILS",
      "KLAUS JANSON INKS",
      "BRITTANY PEZZILLO COLORS",
      "VC'S JOE SABINO LETTERS"
    ]
  },
  "panels": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "position": "top row",
      "visual": "{argument name=\"hero description\" default=\"superhero in red and blue suit with web patterns and spider logo\"} crouching on a rooftop overlooking a city skyline at sunset. Includes a right-side inset panel showing a close-up of the masked face.",
      "text_boxes": 3,
      "text_content": [
        "NEW YORK NEVER STOPS.",
        "AND SOME DAYS IT FEELS LIKE NEITHER DO I.",
        "BUT TODAY... I PAUSED."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "position": "second row",
      "visual": "{argument name=\"civilian description\" default=\"young man with brown hair\"} indoors, looking at a smartphone, holding a mug reading 'WORLD'S OKAYEST SCIENTIST'.",
      "text_boxes": 2,
      "speech_bubbles": 3,
      "text_content": [
        "CITYWIDE OUTAGE AVERTED THANKS TO EARLY RESPONSE BY LOCAL HEROES.",
        "--CHANNEL 5.",
        "\"LOCAL HEROES.\"",
        "THAT'S... NICE.",
        "BUT SOME PEOPLE DON'T GET HEADLINES."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "position": "third row",
      "layout": "diagonally split into 3 sub-scenes",
      "visuals": [
        "young man walking in a city crowd",
        "sepia-toned memory of an older man smiling",
        "superhero swinging on a web"
      ],
      "text_boxes": 4,
      "text_content": [
        "MY UNCLE BEN USED TO SAY:",
        "\"{argument name=\"famous quote\" default=\"WITH GREAT POWER COMES GREAT RESPONSIBILITY.\"}\"",
        "I THINK ABOUT THAT EVERY DAY.",
        "BEING SPIDER-MAN ISN'T JUST ABOUT STOPPING THE BIG THREATS."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "position": "fourth row, left",
      "visual": "superhero shooting a web, swinging into a chaotic street with civilians running from a fire/explosion.",
      "speech_bubbles": 1,
      "text_boxes": 1,
      "text_content": [
        "ON YOUR LEFT!",
        "IT'S ABOUT THE PEOPLE."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "position": "fourth row, right",
      "visual": "close-up of a young Black girl smiling at the superhero.",
      "speech_bubbles": 1,
      "text_boxes": 1,
      "text_content": [
        "THANK YOU, SPIDER-MAN!",
        "ALWAYS."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 6,
      "position": "bottom row",
      "visual": "silhouette of the superhero sitting on a rooftop water tower at dusk.",
      "text_boxes": 2,
      "text_content": [
        "THE CITY NEEDS HOPE.",
        "AND AS LONG AS I CAN SWING, I'LL BE THERE."
      ],
      "footer_text": "TO BE CONTINUED!"
    }
  ]
}

content: A high-quality {argument name="art style" default="anime background art"} illustration of a sprawling fantasy castle complex at {argument name="time of day" default="night"}. The sky is deep blue, filled with sparkling stars and a {argument name="celestial object" default="large full moon"} positioned in the upper left. The architecture consists of light gray stone walls, featuring exactly 8 prominent cylindrical towers with {argument name="roof color" default="blue"} conical roofs, and a main rectangular building with a matching pitched roof. {argument name="window light color" default="warm yellow"} light warmly illuminates the windows, creating a striking contrast against the cool night palette. Elevated stone walkways bridge the gaps between the towers. The central courtyard is paved with neat stone tiles, featuring a single small white cube resting mysteriously in the middle. content: A visual novel screenshot of an anime-style classroom scene featuring exactly four high school girls in matching uniforms consisting of grey blazers, white shirts, red ribbons, and blue skirts. On the far left, a girl with short coral hair and a red bow looks excited with clenched fists. Next to her, a girl with long dark purple hair holds a red book with a gentle smile. Beside her, a girl with short pink pigtails and a red hairclip stands with crossed arms looking slightly grumpy. On the far right, a girl with long brown hair in a ponytail and a large white bow leans forward on a desk, smiling and talking. The classroom features a window on the right, a bulletin board on the left, and a foreground desk holding exactly three items: a notebook, a pink book, and a pen. On the back wall is a single poster reading {argument name="poster text" default="Just Monika. ♥"}. In the top left corner is a circular pastel logo reading {argument name="game title" default="Doki Doki Literature Club!"} decorated with a green pencil and a pink heart. At the bottom of the screen is a pink polka-dot visual novel dialogue box. The name tag reads {argument name="speaker name" default="Monika"} and the main dialogue text reads {argument name="dialogue text" default="'Welcome to the Literature Club!' 'It's a pleasure to meet you all!' ♥"}. Below the dialogue is a menu row reading 'History Skip Auto Save Load Settings'.
